authors_text: Adarsh Sehgal,Nicholas Ward,Hung Manh La,Christos Papachristos,Sushil Louis
title: GA+DDPG+HER: Genetic Algorithm-Based Function Optimizer in Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation Tasks
title_zh: GA+DDPG+HER：机器人操作任务深度强化学习中基于遗传算法的函数优化器
abstract: Agents can base decisions made using reinforcement learning (RL) on a reward function. The selection of values for the learning algorithm parameters can, nevertheless, have a substantial impact on the overall learning process. In order to discover values for the learning parameters that are close to optimal, we extended our previously proposed genetic algorithm-based Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient and Hindsight Experience Replay approach (referred to as GA+DDPG+HER) in this study. On the robotic manipulation tasks of FetchReach, FetchSlide, FetchPush, FetchPick&Place, and DoorOpening, we applied the GA+DDPG+HER methodology. Our technique GA+DDPG+HER was also used in the AuboReach environment with a few adjustments. Our experimental analysis demonstrates that our method produces performance that is noticeably better and occurs faster than the original algorithm. We also offer proof that GA+DDPG+HER beat the current approaches. The final results support our assertion and offer sufficient proof that automating the parameter tuning procedure is crucial and does cut down learning time by as much as 57%.

On the robotic manipulation tasks of FetchReach, FetchSlide, FetchPush, FetchPick&Place, and DoorOpening, we applied the GA+DDPG+HER methodology. Our technique GA+DDPG+HER was also used in the AuboReach environment with a few adjustments. Our experimental analysis demonstrates that our method produces performance that is noticeably better and occurs faster than the original algorithm. We also offer proof that GA+DDPG+HER beat the current approaches. abstract_zh: 代理可以根据奖励函数使用强化学习 (RL) 做出决策。然而，学习算法参数值的选择会对整个学习过程产生重大影响。为了发现接近最优的学习参数值，我们在本研究中扩展了之前提出的基于遗传算法的深度确定性策略梯度和事后经验重播方法（称为 GA+DDPG+HER）。在 FetchReach、FetchSlide、FetchPush、FetchPick&Place 和 DoorOpening 机器人操作任务上，我们应用了 GA+DDPG+HER 方法。我们的技术 GA+DDPG+HER 也在 AuboReach 环境中使用，并进行了一些调整。我们的实验分析表明，我们的方法产生的性能明显优于原始算法，并且发生速度更快。我们还提供了 GA+DDPG+HER 击败当前方法的证据。最终结果支持了我们的主张，并提供了充分的证据，证明参数调整过程自动化至关重要，并且确实将学习时间减少了 57%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合遗传算法（GA）、深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）和 hindsight experience replay（HER）的方法（GA+DDPG+HER），用于优化机器人操作任务中的参数，提升学习效率。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中参数选择对学习效果影响显著，传统方法依赖人工调参效率低，需自动化参数优化以减少学习时间并提升性能。
AI.method: 扩展原有GA+DDPG+HER框架，通过遗传算法自动优化DDPG和HER的超参数，在Fetch系列及AuboReach等机器人操作任务环境中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明GA+DDPG+HER在多个任务中性能优于原始算法，学习时间减少57%，且显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 自动化参数调优对提升深度强化学习效率至关重要，GA+DDPG+HER方法有效验证了该结论。

authors_text: Zhensong Wei,Xuewei Qi,Zhengwei Bai,Guoyuan Wu,Saswat Nayak,Peng Hao,Matthew Barth,Yongkang Liu,Kentaro Oguchi
title: Spatiotemporal Transformer Attention Network for 3D Voxel Level Joint Segmentation and Motion Prediction in Point Cloud
title_zh: 用于点云中 3D 体素级联合分割和运动预测的时空变换器注意网络
abstract: Environment perception including detection, classification, tracking, and motion prediction are key enablers for automated driving systems and intelligent transportation applications. Fueled by the advances in sensing technologies and machine learning techniques, LiDAR-based sensing systems have become a promising solution. The current challenges of this solution are how to effectively combine different perception tasks into a single backbone and how to efficiently learn the spatiotemporal features directly from point cloud sequences. In this research, we propose a novel spatiotemporal attention network based on a transformer self-attention mechanism for joint semantic segmentation and motion prediction within a point cloud at the voxel level. The network is trained to simultaneously outputs the voxel level class and predicted motion by learning directly from a sequence of point cloud datasets. The proposed backbone includes both a temporal attention module (TAM) and a spatial attention module (SAM) to learn and extract the complex spatiotemporal features. This approach has been evaluated with the nuScenes dataset, and promising performance has been achieved.

abstract_zh: 环境感知（包括检测、分类、跟踪和运动预测）是自动驾驶系统和智能交通应用的关键推动因素。在传感技术和机器学习技术进步的推动下，基于激光雷达的传感系统已成为一种有前途的解决方案。该解决方案当前的挑战是如何有效地将不同的感知任务组合到单个主干中，以及如何直接从点云序列有效地学习时空特征。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于变压器自注意力机制的新型时空注意力网络，用于体素级别点云内的联合语义分割和运动预测。该网络经过训练，可以通过直接从一系列点云数据集学习来同时输出体素级别类别和预测运动。所提出的主干包括时间注意模块（TAM）和空间注意模块（SAM）来学习和提取复杂的时空特征。该方法已使用 nuScenes 数据集进行了评估，并取得了可喜的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于时空注意力机制的Transformer网络，用于点云的三维体素级联合分割与运动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效整合多感知任务且无法高效学习点云序列的时空特征，需设计统一框架提升自动驾驶环境感知性能。
AI.method: 构建包含时序注意力模块（TAM）与空间注意力模块（SAM）的Transformer架构，直接从点云序列中联合学习体素分类与运动预测任务。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上验证，取得了良好的分割和运动预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过时空特征联合建模有效提升了多任务性能，为自动驾驶感知系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wentao Shangguan,Yu Sun,Weijie Gan,Ulugbek S. Kamilov
title: Learning Cross-Video Neural Representations for High-Quality Frame Interpolation
title_zh: 学习跨视频神经表示以实现高质量帧插值
abstract: This paper considers the problem of temporal video interpolation, where the goal is to synthesize a new video frame given its two neighbors. We propose Cross-Video Neural Representation (CURE) as the first video interpolation method based on neural fields (NF). NF refers to the recent class of methods for the neural representation of complex 3D scenes that has seen widespread success and application across computer vision. CURE represents the video as a continuous function parameterized by a coordinate-based neural network, whose inputs are the spatiotemporal coordinates and outputs are the corresponding RGB values. CURE introduces a new architecture that conditions the neural network on the input frames for imposing space-time consistency in the synthesized video. This not only improves the final interpolation quality, but also enables CURE to learn a prior across multiple videos. Experimental evaluations show that CURE achieves the state-of-the-art performance on video interpolation on several benchmark datasets.
summary: This paper considers the problem of temporal video interpolation, where the goal is to synthesize a new video frame given its two neighbors. We propose Cross-Video Neural Representation (CURE) as the first video interpolation method based on neural fields (NF). NF refers to the recent class of methods for the neural representation of complex 3D scenes that has seen widespread success and application across computer vision. CURE represents the video as a continuous function parameterized by a coordinate-based neural network, whose inputs are the spatiotemporal coordinates and outputs are the corresponding RGB values. CURE introduces a new architecture that conditions the neural network on the input frames for imposing space-time consistency in the synthesized video. This not only improves the final interpolation quality, but also enables CURE to learn a prior across multiple videos. Experimental evaluations show that CURE achieves the state-of-the-art performance on video interpolation on several benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了时间视频插值问题，其目标是在给定两个相邻视频帧的情况下合成一个新的视频帧。我们提出跨视频神经表示（CURE）作为第一个基于神经场（NF）的视频插值方法。 NF 是指最近一类用于复杂 3D 场景的神经表示的方法，该方法在计算机视觉领域取得了广泛的成功和应用。 CURE 将视频表示为由基于坐标的神经网络参数化的连续函数，其输入是时空坐标，输出是相应的 RGB 值。 CURE 引入了一种新的架构，该架构可在输入帧上调节神经网络，以在合成视频中实现时空一致性。这不仅提高了最终插值质量，而且使 CURE 能够学习多个视频的先验。实验评估表明，CURE 在多个基准数据集上的视频插值方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经场的视频插值方法CURE，旨在通过连续函数建模实现高质量的帧插值。
AI.motivation: 传统视频插值方法难以处理复杂时空一致性，而神经场在三维场景建模中表现优异，因此需探索其在视频插值中的应用。
AI.method: CURE将视频表示为坐标参数化的连续函数，通过条件神经网络在输入帧上建模时空一致性，并跨视频学习先验知识。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CURE达到视频插值的最先进性能，显著提升插值质量与时空连贯性。
AI.conclusion: CURE通过神经场与跨视频学习有效解决了视频插值问题，为高质量生成提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Cross-Video Neural Representations for High-Quality Frame Interpolation 学习跨视频神经表示以实现高质量帧插值 This paper considers the problem of temporal video interpolation, where the goal is to synthesize a new video frame given its two neighbors. We propose Cross-Video Neural Representation (CURE) as the first video interpolation method based on neural fields (NF). NF refers to the recent class of methods for the neural representation of complex 3D scenes that has seen widespread success and application across computer vision. CURE represents the video as a continuous function parameterized by a coordinate-based neural network, whose inputs are the spatiotemporal coordinates and outputs are the corresponding RGB values. CURE introduces a new architecture that conditions the neural network on the input frames for imposing space-time consistency in the synthesized video. This not only improves the final interpolation quality, but also enables CURE to learn a prior across multiple videos. Experimental evaluations show that CURE achieves the state-of-the-art performance on video interpolation on several benchmark datasets. 本文考虑了时间视频插值问题，其目标是在给定两个相邻视频帧的情况下合成一个新的视频帧。我们提出跨视频神经表示（CURE）作为第一个基于神经场（NF）的视频插值方法。 NF 是指最近一类用于复杂 3D 场景的神经表示的方法，该方法在计算机视觉领域取得了广泛的成功和应用。 CURE 将视频表示为由基于坐标的神经网络参数化的连续函数，其输入是时空坐标，输出是相应的 RGB 值。 CURE 引入了一种新的架构，该架构可在输入帧上调节神经网络，以在合成视频中实现时空一致性。这不仅提高了最终插值质量，而且使 CURE 能够学习多个视频的先验。实验评估表明，CURE 在多个基准数据集上的视频插值方面实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于神经场的视频插值方法CURE，旨在通过连续函数建模实现高质量的帧插值。 Wentao Shangguan,Yu Sun,Weijie Gan,Ulugbek S. authors_text: Yunhe Gao,Mu Zhou,Di Liu,Zhennan Yan,Shaoting Zhang,Dimitris N. Metaxas
title: A Data-scalable Transformer for Medical Image Segmentation: Architecture, Model Efficiency, and Benchmark
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的数据可扩展转换器：架构、模型效率和基准
abstract: Transformers have demonstrated remarkable performance in natural language processing and computer vision. However, existing vision Transformers struggle to learn from limited medical data and are unable to generalize on diverse medical image tasks. To tackle these challenges, we present MedFormer, a data-scalable Transformer designed for generalizable 3D medical image segmentation. Our approach incorporates three key elements: a desirable inductive bias, hierarchical modeling with linear-complexity attention, and multi-scale feature fusion that integrates spatial and semantic information globally. MedFormer can learn across tiny- to large-scale data without pre-training. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate MedFormer's potential as a versatile segmentation backbone, outperforming CNNs and vision Transformers on seven public datasets covering multiple modalities (e.g., CT and MRI) and various medical targets (e.g., healthy organs, diseased tissues, and tumors). We provide public access to our models and evaluation pipeline, offering solid baselines and unbiased comparisons to advance a wide range of downstream clinical applications.
summary: Transformers have demonstrated remarkable performance in natural language processing and computer vision. However, existing vision Transformers struggle to learn from limited medical data and are unable to generalize on diverse medical image tasks. To tackle these challenges, we present MedFormer, a data-scalable Transformer designed for generalizable 3D medical image segmentation. Our approach incorporates three key elements: a desirable inductive bias, hierarchical modeling with linear-complexity attention, and multi-scale feature fusion that integrates spatial and semantic information globally. MedFormer can learn across tiny- to large-scale data without pre-training. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate MedFormer's potential as a versatile segmentation backbone, outperforming CNNs and vision Transformers on seven public datasets covering multiple modalities (e.g., CT and MRI) and various medical targets (e.g., healthy organs, diseased tissues, and tumors). We provide public access to our models and evaluation pipeline, offering solid baselines and unbiased comparisons to advance a wide range of downstream clinical applications.
abstract_zh: Transformers 在自然语言处理和计算机视觉方面表现出了卓越的性能。然而，现有的视觉 Transformer 很难从有限的医学数据中学习，并且无法概括不同的医学图像任务。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 MedFormer，这是一种数据可扩展的 Transformer，专为通用 3D 医学图像分割而设计。我们的方法包含三个关键要素：理想的归纳偏差、具有线性复杂性注意的分层建模以及全局集成空间和语义信息的多尺度特征融合。 MedFormer 无需预先训练即可学习从小规模到大规模的数据。综合实验证明了 MedFormer 作为多功能分割主干的潜力，在涵盖多种模式（例如 CT 和 MRI）和各种医疗目标（例如健康器官、患病组织和肿瘤）的七个公共数据集上优于 CNN 和视觉 Transformer。我们向公众提供我们的模型和评估流程，提供可靠的基线和公正的比较，以推进广泛的下游临床应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedFormer，一种适用于医学图像分割的数据可扩展Transformer模型，旨在解决现有模型在有限医学数据和多样化任务上的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer在医学图像任务中面临数据量不足和泛化能力差的挑战，需设计无需预训练且适用于不同规模数据的通用分割模型。
AI.method: MedFormer包含三项关键技术：引入归纳偏置、采用线性复杂度的层次化注意力机制、以及融合多尺度空间与语义信息的特征融合策略。
AI.result: 在七个公开数据集（涵盖CT/MRI等模态及器官/病灶等目标）上，MedFormer优于CNN和现有Transformer，且提供公开模型与评估工具。
AI.conclusion: MedFormer为医学图像分割提供了高效且通用的解决方案，其开源资源有助于推动下游临床应用的发展。

authors_text: Tal August,Lucy Lu Wang,Jonathan Bragg,Marti A. Hearst,Andrew Head,Kyle Lo
title: Paper Plain: Making Medical Research Papers Approachable to Healthcare Consumers with Natural Language Processing
title_zh: Paper Plain：通过自然语言处理使医疗研究论文更容易被医疗保健消费者接受
abstract: When seeking information not covered in patient-friendly documents, like medical pamphlets, healthcare consumers may turn to the research literature. Reading medical papers, however, can be a challenging experience. To improve access to medical papers, we introduce a novel interactive interface-Paper Plain-with four features powered by natural language processing: definitions of unfamiliar terms, in-situ plain language section summaries, a collection of key questions that guide readers to answering passages, and plain language summaries of the answering passages. We evaluate Paper Plain, finding that participants who use Paper Plain have an easier time reading and understanding research papers without a loss in paper comprehension compared to those who use a typical PDF reader. Altogether, the study results suggest that guiding readers to relevant passages and providing plain language summaries, or "gists," alongside the original paper content can make reading medical papers easier and give readers more confidence to approach these papers.

We evaluate Paper Plain, finding that participants who use Paper Plain have an easier time reading and understanding research papers without a loss in paper comprehension compared to those who use a typical PDF reader. Altogether, the study results suggest that guiding readers to relevant passages and providing plain language summaries, or "gists," alongside the original paper content can make reading medical papers easier and give readers more confidence to approach these papers.
abstract_zh: 当寻求患者友好文档（例如医疗小册子）中未涵盖的信息时，医疗保健消费者可能会转向研究文献。然而，阅读医学论文可能是一种具有挑战性的经历。为了提高医学论文的获取率，我们引入了一种新颖的交互界面——Paper Plain——它具有由自然语言处理提供支持的四个功能：不熟悉的术语的定义、原位平白语言部分摘要、引导读者回答段落的关键问题集合以及回答段落的平白语言摘要。我们对 Paper Plain 进行了评估，发现与使用典型 PDF 阅读器的参与者相比，使用 Paper Plain 的参与者可以更轻松地阅读和理解研究论文，并且不会损失论文理解能力。总而言之，研究结果表明，引导读者阅读相关段落并在原始论文内容旁边提供通俗易懂的语言摘要或“要点”可以使阅读医学论文变得更容易，并使读者更有信心阅读这些论文。

AI.tldr: 开发基于自然语言处理的交互式工具Paper Plain，帮助医疗消费者更易理解医学研究论文。
AI.motivation: 医疗消费者难以理解医学研究论文，需提升其可读性与可访问性。
AI.method: 利用自然语言处理技术构建交互式界面，包含术语定义、简洁摘要、关键问题引导及简化段落总结。
AI.result: 使用Paper Plain的参与者阅读和理解医学论文更轻松，且理解力未受影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过引导至相关段落并提供简化摘要，可提升医学论文的可读性与读者信心。

authors_text: Nguyen Sy An,Phan Ngoc Lan,Dao Viet Hang,Dao Van Long,Tran Quang Trung,Nguyen Thi Thuy,Dinh Viet Sang
title: BlazeNeo: Blazing fast polyp segmentation and neoplasm detection
title_zh: BlazeNeo：极快的息肉分割和肿瘤检测
abstract: In recent years, computer-aided automatic polyp segmentation and neoplasm detection have been an emerging topic in medical image analysis, providing valuable support to colonoscopy procedures. Attentions have been paid to improving the accuracy of polyp detection and segmentation. However, not much focus has been given to latency and throughput for performing these tasks on dedicated devices, which can be crucial for practical applications. This paper introduces a novel deep neural network architecture called BlazeNeo, for the task of polyp segmentation and neoplasm detection with an emphasis on compactness and speed while maintaining high accuracy. The model leverages the highly efficient HarDNet backbone alongside lightweight Receptive Field Blocks for computational efficiency, and an auxiliary training mechanism to take full advantage of the training data for the segmentation quality. Our experiments on a challenging dataset show that BlazeNeo achieves improvements in latency and model size while maintaining comparable accuracy against state-of-the-art methods. When deploying on the Jetson AGX Xavier edge device in INT8 precision, our BlazeNeo achieves over 155 fps while yielding the best accuracy among all compared methods.
summary: In recent years, computer-aided automatic polyp segmentation and neoplasm detection have been an emerging topic in medical image analysis, providing valuable support to colonoscopy procedures. Attentions have been paid to improving the accuracy of polyp detection and segmentation. However, not much focus has been given to latency and throughput for performing these tasks on dedicated devices, which can be crucial for practical applications. This paper introduces a novel deep neural network architecture called BlazeNeo, for the task of polyp segmentation and neoplasm detection with an emphasis on compactness and speed while maintaining high accuracy. The model leverages the highly efficient HarDNet backbone alongside lightweight Receptive Field Blocks for computational efficiency, and an auxiliary training mechanism to take full advantage of the training data for the segmentation quality. Our experiments on a challenging dataset show that BlazeNeo achieves improvements in latency and model size while maintaining comparable accuracy against state-of-the-art methods. When deploying on the Jetson AGX Xavier edge device in INT8 precision, our BlazeNeo achieves over 155 fps while yielding the best accuracy among all compared methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，计算机辅助自动息肉分割和肿瘤检测已成为医学图像分析中的新兴主题，为结肠镜检查程序提供了宝贵的支持。人们关注提高息肉检测和分割的准确性。然而，人们并没有过多关注在专用设备上执行这些任务的延迟和吞吐量，而这对于实际应用来说至关重要。本文介绍了一种名为 BlazeNeo 的新型深度神经网络架构，用于息肉分割和肿瘤检测任务，强调紧凑性和速度，同时保持高精度。该模型利用高效的 HarDNet 主干和轻量级感受野块来提高计算效率，并利用辅助训练机制来充分利用训练数据来提高分割质量。我们在具有挑战性的数据集上进行的实验表明，BlazeNeo 在延迟和模型大小方面实现了改进，同时保持了与最先进方法相当的准确性。当以 INT8 精度部署在 Jetson AGX Xavier 边缘设备上时，我们的 BlazeNeo 实现了超过 155 fps，同时在所有比较方法中产生了最佳精度。

search_text: BlazeNeo: Blazing fast polyp segmentation and neoplasm detection BlazeNeo：极快的息肉分割和肿瘤检测 In recent years, computer-aided automatic polyp segmentation and neoplasm detection have been an emerging topic in medical image analysis, providing valuable support to colonoscopy procedures. Attentions have been paid to improving the accuracy of polyp detection and segmentation. However, not much focus has been given to latency and throughput for performing these tasks on dedicated devices, which can be crucial for practical applications. This paper introduces a novel deep neural network architecture called BlazeNeo, for the task of polyp segmentation and neoplasm detection with an emphasis on compactness and speed while maintaining high accuracy. The model leverages the highly efficient HarDNet backbone alongside lightweight Receptive Field Blocks for computational efficiency, and an auxiliary training mechanism to take full advantage of the training data for the segmentation quality. Our experiments on a challenging dataset show that BlazeNeo achieves improvements in latency and model size while maintaining comparable accuracy against state-of-the-art methods. authors_text: Pasquale Lafiosca,Marta Ceccaroni
title: Rectifying homographies for stereo vision: analytical solution for minimal distortion
title_zh: 纠正立体视觉的单应性：最小失真的解析解
comment: ef:Lecture Notes in Networks and Systems, 2022
comments: ef:Lecture Notes in Networks and Systems, 2022
abstract: Stereo rectification is the determination of two image transformations (or homographies) that map corresponding points on the two images, projections of the same point in the 3D space, onto the same horizontal line in the transformed images. Rectification is used to simplify the subsequent stereo correspondence problem and speeding up the matching process. Rectifying transformations, in general, introduce perspective distortion on the obtained images, which shall be minimised to improve the accuracy of the following algorithm dealing with the stereo correspondence problem. The search for the optimal transformations is usually carried out relying on numerical optimisation. This work proposes a closed-form solution for the rectifying homographies that minimise perspective distortion. The experimental comparison confirms its capability to solve the convergence issues of the previous formulation. Its Python implementation is provided.

Rectification is used to simplify the subsequent stereo correspondence problem and speeding up the matching process. Rectifying transformations, in general, introduce perspective distortion on the obtained images, which shall be minimised to improve the accuracy of the following algorithm dealing with the stereo correspondence problem. The search for the optimal transformations is usually carried out relying on numerical optimisation. This work proposes a closed-form solution for the rectifying homographies that minimise perspective distortion. The experimental comparison confirms its capability to solve the convergence issues of the previous formulation. Its Python implementation is provided.
abstract_zh: 立体校正是确定两个图像变换（或单应性），将两个图像上的对应点（3D 空间中同一点的投影）映射到变换图像中的同一水平线上。校正用于简化后续的立体对应问题并加快匹配过程。一般来说，校正变换会在获得的图像上引入透视畸变，应将其最小化，以提高后续处理立体对应问题的算法的准确性。最佳变换的搜索通常依靠数值优化来进行。这项工作提出了一种用于纠正单应性的封闭式解决方案，以最大限度地减少透视变形。实验比较证实了它能够解决先前公式的收敛问题。提供了它的Python 实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于立体视觉校正单应性的解析解方法，以最小化图像透视失真。
AI.motivation: 传统立体校正方法依赖数值优化，易出现收敛问题且引入较大透视失真，影响后续立体匹配精度。
AI.method: 推导出闭式解析解求解最优校正单应性矩阵，通过数学分析直接计算最小化失真的变换参数。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法有效解决数值方法的收敛问题，显著降低图像失真并提升匹配性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的解析解方法在保证计算效率的同时优化了校正精度，为立体视觉应用提供更可靠的预处理方案。

authors_text: George S. Oliveira,Juha Röning,Patricia D. M. Plentz,Jônata T. Carvalho
title: Efficient Task Allocation in Smart Warehouses with Multi-delivery Stations and Heterogeneous Robots
title_zh: 多配送站和异构机器人智能仓库的高效任务分配
abstract: The task allocation problem in multi-robot systems (MRTA) is an NP-hard problem whose viable solutions are usually found by heuristic algorithms. Considering the increasing need of improvement on logistics, the use of robots for increasing the efficiency of logistics warehouses is becoming a requirement. In a smart warehouse the main tasks consist of employing a fleet of automated picking and mobile robots that coordinate by picking up items from a set of orders from the shelves and dropping them at the delivery stations. Two aspects generally justify multi-robot task allocation complexity: (i) environmental aspects, such as multi-delivery stations and dispersed robots (since they remain in constant motion) and (ii) fleet heterogeneity, where robots' traffic speed and capacity loads are different from each other. Despite these properties have been widely researched in the literature, they usually are investigated separately. This work proposes a scalable and efficient task allocation algorithm for smart warehouses with multi-delivery stations and heterogeneous fleets. Our strategy employs a novel cost estimator, which computes costs as a function of the robots' variable characteristics and capacity while they receive new tasks. For validating the strategy a series of experiments is performed simulating the operation of smart warehouses with multiple delivery stations and heteregenous fleets. The results show that our strategy generates routes costing up to $33$\% less than the routes generated by a state-of-the-art task allocation algorithm and $96$\% faster in test instances representing our target scenario. Considering single-delivery stations and non-dispersed robots, we reduced the number of robots by up to $18$\%, allocating tasks $92$\% faster, and generating routes whose costs are statistically similar to the routes generated by the state-of-the-art algorithm.

abstract_zh: 多机器人系统（MRTA）中的任务分配问题是一个NP难问题，其可行的解决方案通常通过启发式算法找到。考虑到物流改进的需求日益增加，使用机器人来提高物流仓库的效率已成为一种要求。在智能仓库中，主要任务包括使用一组自动拣选和移动机器人，这些机器人通过从货架上的一组订单中拾取物品并将其投放到送货站进行协调。通常有两个方面证明了多机器人任务分配的复杂性：（i）环境方面，例如多个送货站和分散的机器人（因为它们保持持续运动）和（ii）车队异质性，其中机器人的交通速度和容量负载彼此不同。尽管这些特性在文献中得到了广泛的研究，但它们通常是单独研究的。这项工作为具有多个配送站和异构车队的智能仓库提出了一种可扩展且高效的任务分配算法。我们的策略采用了一种新颖的成本估算器，该估算器根据机器人接收新任务时的可变特征和能力来计算成本。为了验证该策略，进行了一系列实验，模拟具有多个配送站和异构车队的智能仓库的运行。结果表明，我们的策略生成的路由成本比最先进的任务分配算法生成的路由低 33$\%，并且在代表我们目标场景的测试实例中速度快了 96$\%。考虑到单一配送站和非分散机器人，我们将机器人数量减少了高达 $18$\%，任务分配速度提高了 $92$\%，并且生成的路线在统计上与最先进算法生成的路线相似。

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对多配送站和异构机器人的智能仓库高效任务分配算法。
AI.motivation: 物流效率提升需求下，现有任务分配算法未能有效结合多配送站与异构机器人特性，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 设计新型成本估算器，综合机器人动态特性与容量变量，并通过模拟实验验证算法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，算法使路线成本降低33%，处理速度提升96%；在单配送站场景下减少18%机器人，任务分配速度提升92%，成本与现有算法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决多配送站与异构机器人任务分配问题，显著提升智能仓库物流效率，具备实际应用潜力。

search_text: Efficient Task Allocation in Smart Warehouses with Multi-delivery Stations and Heterogeneous Robots 多配送站和异构机器人智能仓库的高效任务分配 The task allocation problem in multi-robot systems (MRTA) is an NP-hard problem whose viable solutions are usually found by heuristic algorithms. Considering the increasing need of improvement on logistics, the use of robots for increasing the efficiency of logistics warehouses is becoming a requirement. In a smart warehouse the main tasks consist of employing a fleet of automated picking and mobile robots that coordinate by picking up items from a set of orders from the shelves and dropping them at the delivery stations. Two aspects generally justify multi-robot task allocation complexity: (i) environmental aspects, such as multi-delivery stations and dispersed robots (since they remain in constant motion) and (ii) fleet heterogeneity, where robots' traffic speed and capacity loads are different from each other. Despite these properties have been widely researched in the literature, they usually are investigated separately. This work proposes a scalable and efficient task allocation algorithm for smart warehouses with multi-delivery stations and heterogeneous fleets. Our strategy employs a novel cost estimator, which computes costs as a function of the robots' variable characteristics and capacity while they receive new tasks. For validating the strategy a series of experiments is performed simulating the operation of smart warehouses with multiple delivery stations and heteregenous fleets. The results show that our strategy generates routes costing up to $33$\% less than the routes generated by a state-of-the-art task allocation algorithm and $96$\% faster in test instances representing our target scenario. Considering single-delivery stations and non-dispersed robots, we reduced the number of robots by up to $18$\%, allocating tasks $92$\% faster, and generating routes whose costs are statistically similar to the routes generated by the state-of-the-art algorithm. 多机器人系统（MRTA）中的任务分配问题是一个NP难问题，其可行的解决方案通常通过启发式算法找到。考虑到物流改进的需求日益增加，使用机器人来提高物流仓库的效率已成为一种要求。在智能仓库中，主要任务包括使用一组自动拣选和移动机器人，这些机器人通过从货架上的一组订单中拾取物品并将其投放到送货站进行协调。通常有两个方面证明了多机器人任务分配的复杂性：（i）环境方面，例如多个送货站和分散的机器人（因为它们保持持续运动）和（ii）车队异质性，其中机器人的交通速度和容量负载彼此不同。尽管这些特性在文献中得到了广泛的研究，但它们通常是单独研究的。这项工作为具有多个配送站和异构车队的智能仓库提出了一种可扩展且高效的任务分配算法。我们的策略采用了一种新颖的成本估算器，该估算器根据机器人接收新任务时的可变特征和能力来计算成本。为了验证该策略，进行了一系列实验，模拟具有多个配送站和异构车队的智能仓库的运行。结果表明，我们的策略生成的路由成本比最先进的任务分配算法生成的路由低 33$\%，并且在代表我们目标场景的测试实例中速度快了 96$\%。考虑到单一配送站和非分散机器人，我们将机器人数量减少了高达 $18$\%，任务分配速度提高了 $92$\%，并且生成的路线在统计上与最先进算法生成的路线相似。 提出一种针对多配送站和异构机器人的智能仓库高效任务分配算法。 George S. Oliveira,Juha Röning,Patricia D. M. Plentz,Jônata T. Carvalho cs.RO

authors_text: Matthew Ciolino,Dominick Hambrick,David Noever
title: Enhancing Satellite Imagery using Deep Learning for the Sensor To Shooter Timeline
title_zh: 使用深度学习增强卫星图像从传感器到射击者的时间线
abstract: The sensor to shooter timeline is affected by two main variables: satellite positioning and asset positioning. Speeding up satellite positioning by adding more sensors or by decreasing processing time is important only if there is a prepared shooter, otherwise the main source of time is getting the shooter into position. However, the intelligence community should work towards the exploitation of sensors to the highest speed and effectiveness possible. Achieving a high effectiveness while keeping speed high is a tradeoff that must be considered in the sensor to shooter timeline. In this paper we investigate two main ideas, increasing the effectiveness of satellite imagery through image manipulation and how on-board image manipulation would affect the sensor to shooter timeline. We cover these ideas in four scenarios: Discrete Event Simulation of onboard processing versus ground station processing, quality of information with cloud cover removal, information improvement with super resolution, and data reduction with image to caption. This paper will show how image manipulation techniques such as Super Resolution, Cloud Removal, and Image to Caption will improve the quality of delivered information in addition to showing how those processes effect the sensor to shooter timeline.

abstract_zh: 传感器到射击者的时间线受到两个主要变量的影响：卫星定位和资产定位。只有在有准备好的射手的情况下，通过添加更多传感器或减少处理时间来加速卫星定位才重要，否则时间的主要来源是让射手就位。然而，情报界应努力以尽可能高的速度和效率利用传感器。在保持高速度的同时实现高效率是传感器到射手时间线中必须考虑的权衡。在本文中，我们研究了两个主要想法，通过图像处理提高卫星图像的有效性，以及机载图像处理如何影响传感器到射击者的时间线。我们在四个场景中讨论这些想法：机载处理与地面站处理的离散事件模拟、云层去除的信息质量、超分辨率的信息改进以及图像到字幕的数据缩减。本文将展示超分辨率、云去除和图像转字幕等图像处理技术如何提高所传递信息的质量，此外还展示这些过程如何影响传感器到射击者的时间线。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过深度学习技术（如超分辨率、云层去除和图像到字幕）增强卫星图像质量，并分析其对传感器到射手时间线的影响。
AI.motivation: 传感器到射手时间线受限于卫星定位和资产定位效率，需在提升信息质量与处理速度间寻求平衡，以优化作战响应效率。
AI.method: 通过四个场景分析：机载与地面处理的离散事件模拟、云层去除、超分辨率提升及图像到字幕的数据压缩，评估图像处理技术对时间线的影响。
AI.result: 图像增强技术显著提升信息质量，但处理速度与数据量的权衡需根据具体任务调整，以优化整体时间线效率。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习驱动的图像处理可有效提升卫星情报质量，但需结合任务需求动态调整处理策略，以实现速度与效率的最优平衡。

authors_text: Pia Bideau,Erik Learned-Miller,Cordelia Schmid,Karteek Alahari
title: The Right Spin: Learning Object Motion from Rotation-Compensated Flow Fields
title_zh: 正确的旋转：从旋转补偿流场学习物体运动
abstract: Both a good understanding of geometrical concepts and a broad familiarity with objects lead to our excellent perception of moving objects. The human ability to detect and segment moving objects works in the presence of multiple objects, complex background geometry, motion of the observer and even camouflage. How humans perceive moving objects so reliably is a longstanding research question in computer vision and borrows findings from related areas such as psychology, cognitive science and physics. One approach to the problem is to teach a deep network to model all of these effects. This contrasts with the strategy used by human vision, where cognitive processes and body design are tightly coupled and each is responsible for certain aspects of correctly identifying moving objects. Similarly from the computer vision perspective, there is evidence that classical, geometry-based techniques are better suited to the "motion-based" parts of the problem, while deep networks are more suitable for modeling appearance. In this work, we argue that the coupling of camera rotation and camera translation can create complex motion fields that are difficult for a deep network to untangle directly. We present a novel probabilistic model to estimate the camera's rotation given the motion field. We then rectify the flow field to obtain a rotation-compensated motion field for subsequent segmentation. This strategy of first estimating camera motion, and then allowing a network to learn the remaining parts of the problem, yields improved results on the widely used DAVIS benchmark as well as the recently published motion segmentation data set MoCA (Moving Camouflaged Animals).

abstract_zh: 对几何概念的良好理解和对物体的广泛熟悉使我们能够对移动物体产生出色的感知。人类检测和分割移动物体的能力在存在多个物体、复杂的背景几何形状、观察者的运动甚至伪装的情况下发挥作用。人类如何如此可靠地感知移动物体是计算机视觉领域一个长期存在的研究问题，并借鉴了心理学、认知科学和物理学等相关领域的研究成果。解决这个问题的一种方法是训练深度网络来模拟所有这些影响。这与人类视觉使用的策略形成鲜明对比，其中认知过程和身体设计紧密耦合，并且各自负责正确识别移动物体的某些方面。同样，从计算机视觉的角度来看，有证据表明基于几何的经典技术更适合问题的“基于运动”的部分，而深度网络更适合对外观进行建模。在这项工作中，我们认为相机旋转和相机平移的耦合可以创建复杂的运动场，而深度网络很难直接解开这些运动场。我们提出了一种新颖的概率模型来估计给定运动场的相机旋转。然后，我们对流场进行校正以获得旋转补偿运动场以用于后续分割。这种首先估计相机运动，然后让网络学习问题的其余部分的策略，在广泛使用的 DAVIS 基准以及最近发布的运动分割数据集 MoCA（移动伪装动物）上产生了改进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过旋转补偿光流场学习物体运动的方法，以提升运动分割效果。
AI.motivation: 深度网络难以直接分离相机旋转与平移带来的复杂运动场，而人类视觉和传统几何方法在处理运动相关问题时更具优势。
AI.method: 构建概率模型估计相机旋转，通过校正光流场消除旋转影响，再利用网络学习剩余运动信息。
AI.result: 在DAVIS和MoCA数据集上均取得优于现有方法的运动分割效果。
AI.conclusion: 将经典几何方法与深度学习结合，通过先估计相机运动再处理物体运动，可有效提升分割性能。

This contrasts with the strategy used by human vision, where cognitive processes and body design are tightly coupled and each is responsible for certain aspects of correctly identifying moving objects. Similarly from the computer vision perspective, there is evidence that classical, geometry-based techniques are better suited to the "motion-based" parts of the problem, while deep networks are more suitable for modeling appearance. In this work, we argue that the coupling of camera rotation and camera translation can create complex motion fields that are difficult for a deep network to untangle directly. We present a novel probabilistic model to estimate the camera's rotation given the motion field. We then rectify the flow field to obtain a rotation-compensated motion field for subsequent segmentation. This strategy of first estimating camera motion, and then allowing a network to learn the remaining parts of the problem, yields improved results on the widely used DAVIS benchmark as well as the recently published motion segmentation data set MoCA (Moving Camouflaged Animals). 对几何概念的良好理解和对物体的广泛熟悉使我们能够对移动物体产生出色的感知。人类检测和分割移动物体的能力在存在多个物体、复杂的背景几何形状、观察者的运动甚至伪装的情况下发挥作用。人类如何如此可靠地感知移动物体是计算机视觉领域一个长期存在的研究问题，并借鉴了心理学、认知科学和物理学等相关领域的研究成果。解决这个问题的一种方法是训练深度网络来模拟所有这些影响。这与人类视觉使用的策略形成鲜明对比，其中认知过程和身体设计紧密耦合，并且各自负责正确识别移动物体的某些方面。同样，从计算机视觉的角度来看，有证据表明基于几何的经典技术更适合问题的“基于运动”的部分，而深度网络更适合对外观进行建模。在这项工作中，我们认为相机旋转和相机平移的耦合可以创建复杂的运动场，而深度网络很难直接解开这些运动场。我们提出了一种新颖的概率模型来估计给定运动场的相机旋转。然后，我们对流场进行校正以获得旋转补偿运动场以用于后续分割。这种首先估计相机运动，然后让网络学习问题的其余部分的策略，在广泛使用的 DAVIS 基准以及最近发布的运动分割数据集 MoCA（移动伪装动物）上产生了改进的结果。 本文提出一种通过旋转补偿光流场学习物体运动的方法，以提升运动分割效果。 Pia Bideau,Erik Learned-Miller,Cordelia Schmid,Karteek Alahari cs.CV

authors_text: Hugo Caselles-Dupré,Mohamed Chetouani,Olivier Sigaud
title: Pedagogical Demonstrations and Pragmatic Learning in Artificial Tutor-Learner Interactions
title_zh: 人工师生互动中的教学示范和实用学习
comment: Accepted to HIRL workshop at HRI 2022
comments: Accepted to HIRL workshop at HRI 2022
abstract: When demonstrating a task, human tutors pedagogically modify their behavior by either "showing" the task rather than just "doing" it (exaggerating on relevant parts of the demonstration) or by giving demonstrations that best disambiguate the communicated goal. Analogously, human learners pragmatically infer the communicative intent of the tutor: they interpret what the tutor is trying to teach them and deduce relevant information for learning. Without such mechanisms, traditional Learning from Demonstration (LfD) algorithms will consider such demonstrations as sub-optimal. In this paper, we investigate the implementation of such mechanisms in a tutor-learner setup where both participants are artificial agents in an environment with multiple goals. Using pedagogy from the tutor and pragmatism from the learner, we show substantial improvements over standard learning from demonstrations.
summary: When demonstrating a task, human tutors pedagogically modify their behavior by either "showing" the task rather than just "doing" it (exaggerating on relevant parts of the demonstration) or by giving demonstrations that best disambiguate the communicated goal. Analogously, human learners pragmatically infer the communicative intent of the tutor: they interpret what the tutor is trying to teach them and deduce relevant information for learning. Without such mechanisms, traditional Learning from Demonstration (LfD) algorithms will consider such demonstrations as sub-optimal. In this paper, we investigate the implementation of such mechanisms in a tutor-learner setup where both participants are artificial agents in an environment with multiple goals. Using pedagogy from the tutor and pragmatism from the learner, we show substantial improvements over standard learning from demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 在演示一项任务时，人类导师会通过“展示”任务而不是仅仅“做”任务（夸大演示的相关部分）或通过进行最能消除所传达目标歧义的演示来调整他们的行为。类似地，人类学习者务实地推断导师的交际意图：他们解释导师试图教他们的内容，并推断出相关的学习信息。如果没有这样的机制，传统的演示学习 (LfD) 算法将认为此类演示是次优的。在本文中，我们研究了此类机制在导师-学习者设置中的实现，其中参与者都是具有多个目标的环境中的人工智能体。利用导师的教学法和学习者的实用主义，我们比标准演示学习有了显着的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在人工智能导师-学习者互动中引入教学策略与实用学习机制，以改进传统基于演示的学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于演示的学习算法无法有效处理人类导师的教学调整和学习者的意图推断，导致学习效果受限。
AI.method: 在多目标环境中构建人工导师与学习者系统，导师通过强调关键步骤和消除歧义的演示进行教学，学习者通过意图推断机制解析教学内容。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合教学策略与实用学习机制的系统显著优于标准基于演示的学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 教学与实用学习机制的结合能有效提升人工智能教育系统的性能，为复杂任务学习提供新方向。

authors_text: Pratikkumar Prajapati,Chris Pollett
title: MRI-GAN: A Generalized Approach to Detect DeepFakes using Perceptual Image Assessment
title_zh: MRI-GAN：使用感知图像评估检测 DeepFakes 的通用方法
abstract: DeepFakes are synthetic videos generated by swapping a face of an original image with the face of somebody else. In this paper, we describe our work to develop general, deep learning-based models to classify DeepFake content. We propose a novel framework for using Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)-based models, we call MRI-GAN, that utilizes perceptual differences in images to detect synthesized videos. We test our MRI-GAN approach and a plain-frames-based model using the DeepFake Detection Challenge Dataset. Our plain frames-based-model achieves 91% test accuracy and a model which uses our MRI-GAN framework with Structural Similarity Index Measurement (SSIM) for the perceptual differences achieves 74% test accuracy. The results of MRI-GAN are preliminary and may be improved further by modifying the choice of loss function, tuning hyper-parameters, or by using a more advanced perceptual similarity metric.
summary: DeepFakes are synthetic videos generated by swapping a face of an original image with the face of somebody else. In this paper, we describe our work to develop general, deep learning-based models to classify DeepFake content. We propose a novel framework for using Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)-based models, we call MRI-GAN, that utilizes perceptual differences in images to detect synthesized videos. We test our MRI-GAN approach and a plain-frames-based model using the DeepFake Detection Challenge Dataset. Our plain frames-based-model achieves 91% test accuracy and a model which uses our MRI-GAN framework with Structural Similarity Index Measurement (SSIM) for the perceptual differences achieves 74% test accuracy. The results of MRI-GAN are preliminary and may be improved further by modifying the choice of loss function, tuning hyper-parameters, or by using a more advanced perceptual similarity metric.
abstract_zh: DeepFakes 是通过将原始图像的脸部与其他人的脸部交换而生成的合成视频。在本文中，我们描述了开发通用的、基于深度学习的模型来对 DeepFake 内容进行分类的工作。我们提出了一种使用基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的模型的新颖框架，我们称之为 MRI-GAN，它利用图像中的感知差异来检测合成视频。我们使用 DeepFake 检测挑战数据集测试我们的 MRI-GAN 方法和基于纯帧的模型。我们基于普通帧的模型实现了 91% 的测试准确度，而使用我们的 MRI-GAN 框架和结构相似性指数测量 (SSIM) 来测量感知差异的模型实现了 74% 的测试准确度。 MRI-GAN 的结果是初步的，可以通过修改损失函数的选择、调整超参数或使用更先进的感知相似性度量来进一步改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于感知图像评估的MRI-GAN框架，用于检测深度伪造视频。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造视频技术日益成熟，现有检测方法存在泛化能力不足的问题，需开发更通用且依赖感知差异的检测模型。
AI.method: 设计MRI-GAN框架，结合生成对抗网络（GAN）与结构相似性指数（SSIM）衡量图像感知差异，对比普通帧模型进行实验验证。
AI.result: 普通帧模型测试准确率达91%，MRI-GAN框架结合SSIM的模型测试准确率为74%，但结果具有初步性且存在改进空间。
AI.conclusion: MRI-GAN为深度伪造检测提供了新思路，未来可通过优化损失函数、调参或采用更先进的感知度量提升性能。

authors_text: Hossein Keshavarz,Meiyappan Nagappan
title: ApacheJIT: A Large Dataset for Just-In-Time Defect Prediction
title_zh: ApacheJIT：用于即时缺陷预测的大型数据集
abstract: In this paper, we present ApacheJIT, a large dataset for Just-In-Time defect prediction. ApacheJIT consists of clean and bug-inducing software changes in popular Apache projects. ApacheJIT has a total of 106,674 commits (28,239 bug-inducing and 78,435 clean commits). Having a large number of commits makes ApacheJIT a suitable dataset for machine learning models, especially deep learning models that require large training sets to effectively generalize the patterns present in the historical data to future data.
summary: In this paper, we present ApacheJIT, a large dataset for Just-In-Time defect prediction. ApacheJIT consists of clean and bug-inducing software changes in popular Apache projects. ApacheJIT has a total of 106,674 commits (28,239 bug-inducing and 78,435 clean commits). Having a large number of commits makes ApacheJIT a suitable dataset for machine learning models, especially deep learning models that require large training sets to effectively generalize the patterns present in the historical data to future data.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 ApacheJIT，这是一个用于即时缺陷预测的大型数据集。 ApacheJIT 由流行 Apache 项目中干净且容易引发错误的软件更改组成。 ApacheJIT 共有 106,674 次提交（28,239 次错误引发和 78,435 次干净提交）。拥有大量提交使得 ApacheJIT 成为机器学习模型的合适数据集，尤其是需要大量训练集才能有效地将历史数据中存在的模式推广到未来数据的深度学习模型。

AI.tldr: 构建用于即时缺陷预测的大规模数据集ApacheJIT
AI.motivation: 现有数据集规模不足，难以满足深度学习模型训练需求，需更大数据集提升预测效果
AI.method: 收集Apache项目历史提交数据，标注为引入错误或干净提交，构建大规模数据集
AI.result: 包含106,674次提交（28,239次引入错误，78,435次干净），适合机器学习模型训练
AI.conclusion: ApacheJIT为JIT缺陷预测提供了高质量数据集，有助于提升模型性能

search_text: ApacheJIT: A Large Dataset for Just-In-Time Defect Prediction ApacheJIT：用于即时缺陷预测的大型数据集 In this paper, we present ApacheJIT, a large dataset for Just-In-Time defect prediction. ApacheJIT consists of clean and bug-inducing software changes in popular Apache projects. ApacheJIT has a total of 106,674 commits (28,239 bug-inducing and 78,435 clean commits). Having a large number of commits makes ApacheJIT a suitable dataset for machine learning models, especially deep learning models that require large training sets to effectively generalize the patterns present in the historical data to future data. 在本文中，我们提出了 ApacheJIT，这是一个用于即时缺陷预测的大型数据集。 ApacheJIT 由流行 Apache 项目中干净且容易引发错误的软件更改组成。 ApacheJIT 共有 106,674 次提交（28,239 次错误引发和 78,435 次干净提交）。拥有大量提交使得 ApacheJIT 成为机器学习模型的合适数据集，尤其是需要大量训练集才能有效地将历史数据中存在的模式推广到未来数据的深度学习模型。 构建用于即时缺陷预测的大规模数据集ApacheJIT Hossein Keshavarz,Meiyappan Nagappan cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.PL

authors_text: Martin Cousineau,Vedat Verter,Susan A. Murphy,Joelle Pineau
title: Estimating causal effects with optimization-based methods: A review and empirical comparison
title_zh: 使用基于优化的方法估计因果效应：回顾和实证比较
abstract: In the absence of randomized controlled and natural experiments, it is necessary to balance the distributions of (observable) covariates of the treated and control groups in order to obtain an unbiased estimate of a causal effect of interest; otherwise, a different effect size may be estimated, and incorrect recommendations may be given. To achieve this balance, there exist a wide variety of methods. In particular, several methods based on optimization models have been recently proposed in the causal inference literature. While these optimization-based methods empirically showed an improvement over a limited number of other causal inference methods in their relative ability to balance the distributions of covariates and to estimate causal effects, they have not been thoroughly compared to each other and to other noteworthy causal inference methods. In addition, we believe that there exist several unaddressed opportunities that operational researchers could contribute with their advanced knowledge of optimization, for the benefits of the applied researchers that use causal inference tools. In this review paper, we present an overview of the causal inference literature and describe in more detail the optimization-based causal inference methods, provide a comparative analysis of the prevailing optimization-based methods, and discuss opportunities for new methods.

abstract_zh: 在缺乏随机对照和自然实验的情况下，有必要平衡治疗组和对照组的（可观察）协变量的分布，以获得对感兴趣的因果效应的无偏估计；否则，可能会估计出不同的效应大小，并且可能会给出错误的建议。为了实现这种平衡，存在多种方法。特别是，最近在因果推理文献中提出了几种基于优化模型的方法。虽然这些基于优化的方法在平衡协变量分布和估计因果效应的相对能力方面比有限数量的其他因果推理方法表现出了改进，但它们之间以及与其他值得注意的因果推理方法之间尚未进行彻底的比较。此外，我们认为，存在一些尚未解决的机会，操作研究人员可以利用其先进的优化知识做出贡献，以造福于使用因果推理工具的应用研究人员。在这篇综述论文中，我们概述了因果推理文献，并更详细地描述了基于优化的因果推理方法，对流行的基于优化的方法进行了比较分析，并讨论了新方法的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文综述并比较了基于优化模型的因果效应估计方法，探讨其在因果推断中的应用与改进空间。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏随机对照实验的情况下，需通过平衡协变量分布来估计因果效应，但现有优化方法未被系统比较，且存在改进机会。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与实证比较，分析主流优化方法的协变量平衡能力与因果效应估计效果，并讨论新方法的潜力。
AI.result: 发现优化方法在协变量平衡上优于部分传统方法，但方法间比较不足，且存在未解决的改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 优化方法为因果推断提供新思路，需进一步系统比较与创新，以提升实际应用价值。

authors_text: Francesco Braghin,Luca Paparusso,Manuel Riani,Fabio Ruggeri
title: Competitors-Aware Stochastic Lap Strategy Optimisation for Race Hybrid Vehicles
title_zh: 竞赛混合动力车辆的竞争对手感知随机圈策略优化
comment: 15 pages, 19 figures, 3 tables. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: 15 pages, 19 figures, 3 tables. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: World Endurance Championship (WEC) racing events are characterised by a relevant performance gap among competitors. The fastest vehicles category, consisting in hybrid vehicles, has to respect energy usage constraints set by the technical regulation. Considering absence of competitors, i.e. traffic conditions, the optimal energy usage strategy for lap time minimisation is typically computed through a constrained optimisation problem. To the best of our knowledge, the majority of state-of-the-art works neglects competitors. This leads to a mismatch with the real world, where traffic generates considerable time losses. To bridge this gap, we propose a new framework to offline compute optimal strategies for the powertrain energy management considering competitors. Through analysis of the available data from previous events, statistics on the sector times and overtaking probabilities are extracted to encode the competitors' behaviour. Adopting a multi-agent model, the statistics are then used to generate realistic Monte Carlo (MC) simulation of their position along the track. The simulator is then adopted to identify the optimal strategy as follows. We develop a longitudinal vehicle model for the ego-vehicle and implement an optimisation problem for lap time minimisation in absence of traffic, based on Genetic Algorithms. Solving the optimisation problem for a variety of constraints generates a set of candidate optimal strategies. Stochastic Dynamic Programming is finally implemented to choose the best strategy considering competitors, whose motion is generated by the MC simulator. Our approach, validated on data from a real stint of race, allows to significantly reduce the lap time.

abstract_zh: 世界耐力锦标赛 (WEC) 赛车赛事的特点是参赛者之间存在相关的表现差距。最快的车辆类别（包括混合动力车辆）必须遵守技术法规规定的能源使用限制。考虑到没有竞争对手，即交通状况，单圈时间最小化的最佳能源使用策略通常是通过约束优化问题来计算的。据我们所知，大多数最先进的作品都忽视了竞争对手。这会导致与现实世界的不匹配，现实世界中的交通会产生大量的时间损失。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一个新的框架来离线计算考虑竞争对手的动力总成能源管理的最佳策略。通过分析以往赛事的可用数据，提取赛段时间和超车概率的统计数据，以对参赛者的行为进行编码。采用多智能体模型，然后使用统计数据生成其沿轨道位置的真实蒙特卡罗 (MC) 模拟。然后采用模拟器来确定最优策略，如下所示。我们为自我车辆开发了一个纵向车辆模型，并基于遗传算法实现了在没有交通的情况下单圈时间最小化的优化问题。解决各种约束条件下的优化问题会生成一组候选最优策略。最后采用随机动态规划来选择考虑竞争对手的最佳策略，其运动由 MC 模拟器生成。我们的方法经过真实比赛数据的验证，可以显着减少单圈时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种考虑竞争对手的混合动力赛车圈速策略优化框架，通过蒙特卡洛模拟和动态规划实现能量管理优化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽略赛车间竞争关系，导致策略与实际比赛中的交通影响存在偏差，需开发更贴近现实的优化方法。
AI.method: 基于历史数据构建多智能体模型生成对手轨迹，结合遗传算法生成候选策略集，再通过随机动态规划选择最优策略。
AI.result: 在真实比赛数据验证中，该方法显著降低了混合动力赛车的圈速时间。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效弥补了传统优化方法的不足，为赛车能量管理提供了更实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Palash Dey,Debajyoti Kar,Swagato Sanyal
title: Sampling-Based Winner Prediction in District-Based Elections
title_zh: 地区选举中基于抽样的获胜者预测
abstract: In a district-based election, we apply a voting rule $r$ to decide the winners in each district, and a candidate who wins in a maximum number of districts is the winner of the election. We present efficient sampling-based algorithms to predict the winner of such district-based election systems in this paper. When $r$ is plurality and the margin of victory is known to be at least $\varepsilon$ fraction of the total population, we present an algorithm to predict the winner. The sample complexity of our algorithm is $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon^4}\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}\log\frac{1}δ\right)$. We complement this result by proving that any algorithm, from a natural class of algorithms, for predicting the winner in a district-based election when $r$ is plurality, must sample at least $Ω\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon^4}\log\frac{1}δ\right)$ votes. We then extend this result to any voting rule $r$. Loosely speaking, we show that we can predict the winner of a district-based election with an extra overhead of $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon^2}\log\frac{1}δ\right)$ over the sample complexity of predicting the single-district winner under $r$. We further extend our algorithm for the case when the margin of victory is unknown, but we have only two candidates. We then consider the median voting rule when the set of preferences in each district is single-peaked. We show that the winner of a district-based election can be predicted with $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon^4}\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}\log\frac{1}δ\right)$ samples even when the harmonious order in different districts can be different and even unknown. Finally, we also show some results for estimating the margin of victory of a district-based election within both additive and multiplicative error bounds.

abstract_zh: 在基于选区的选举中，我们应用投票规则$r$来决定每个选区的获胜者，在最多选区中获胜的候选人就是选举的获胜者。在本文中，我们提出了基于采样的有效算法来预测此类基于地区的选举系统的获胜者。当 $r$ 为多数且已知胜利幅度至少为总人口的 $\varepsilon$ 分数时，我们提出一种算法来预测获胜者。我们算法的样本复杂度为$\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon^4}\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}\log\frac{1}δ\right)$。我们通过证明自然类算法中的任何算法，在 $r$ 为复数时预测基于选区的选举中的获胜者，必须至少采样 $Ω\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon^4}\log\frac{1}δ\right)$ 选票来补充这一结果。然后我们将此结果扩展到任何投票规则 $r$。宽松地说，我们表明，与在 $r$ 下预测单选区获胜者的样本复杂度相比，我们可以以 $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon^2}\log\frac{1}δ\right)$ 的额外开销来预测基于选区的选举的获胜者。我们进一步扩展了我们的算法，适用于胜率未知但只有两个候选者的情况。然后，我们考虑当每个选区的偏好集是单峰时的中值投票规则。我们证明，即使不同选区的和谐顺序可能不同甚至未知，也可以通过 $\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{1}{\varepsilon^4}\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}\log\frac{1}δ\right)$ 样本来预测基于选区的选举的获胜者。最后，我们还展示了在加法和乘法误差范围内估计选区选举获胜幅度的一些结果。

authors_text: Ali Raza,Lazar Lolic,Shahmir Akhter,Alfonso Dela Cruz,Michael Liut
title: Deep Camera Pose Regression Using Pseudo-LiDAR
title_zh: 使用伪激光雷达进行深度相机姿态回归
abstract: An accurate and robust large-scale localization system is an integral component for active areas of research such as autonomous vehicles and augmented reality. To this end, many learning algorithms have been proposed that predict 6DOF camera pose from RGB or RGB-D images. However, previous methods that incorporate depth typically treat the data the same way as RGB images, often adding depth maps as additional channels to RGB images and passing them through convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In this paper, we show that converting depth maps into pseudo-LiDAR signals, previously shown to be useful for 3D object detection, is a better representation for camera localization tasks by projecting point clouds that can accurately determine 6DOF camera pose. This is demonstrated by first comparing localization accuracies of a network operating exclusively on pseudo-LiDAR representations, with networks operating exclusively on depth maps. We then propose FusionLoc, a novel architecture that uses pseudo-LiDAR to regress a 6DOF camera pose. FusionLoc is a dual stream neural network, which aims to remedy common issues with typical 2D CNNs operating on RGB-D images. The results from this architecture are compared against various other state-of-the-art deep pose regression implementations using the 7 Scenes dataset. The findings are that FusionLoc performs better than a number of other camera localization methods, with a notable improvement being, on average, 0.33m and 4.35° more accurate than RGB-D PoseNet. By proving the validity of using pseudo-LiDAR signals over depth maps for localization, there are new considerations when implementing large-scale localization systems.

abstract_zh: 准确而强大的大规模定位系统是自动驾驶汽车和增强现实等活跃研究领域不可或缺的组成部分。为此，人们提出了许多从 RGB 或 RGB-D 图像预测 6DOF 相机姿态的学习算法。然而，以前结合深度的方法通常以与 RGB 图像相同的方式处理数据，通常将深度图作为附加通道添加到 RGB 图像，并将它们传递给卷积神经网络 (CNN)。在本文中，我们表明，将深度图转换为伪 LiDAR 信号（先前已被证明可用于 3D 对象检测）是通过投影可以准确确定 6DOF 相机姿态的点云来更好地表示相机定位任务。首先通过比较仅在伪激光雷达表示上运行的网络与仅在深度图上运行的网络的定位精度来证明这一点。然后，我们提出了 FusionLoc，这是一种使用伪 LiDAR 来回归 6DOF 相机姿态的新颖架构。 FusionLoc 是一种双流神经网络，旨在解决在 RGB-D 图像上运行的典型 2D CNN 的常见问题。使用 7 个场景数据集将该架构的结果与各种其他最先进的深度姿势回归实现进行比较。研究结果表明，FusionLoc 的性能优于许多其他相机定位方法，显着提高，平均比 RGB-D PoseNet 准确度高 0.33m 和 4.35°。通过证明在深度图上使用伪激光雷达信号进行定位的有效性，在实施大规模定位系统时有了新的考虑因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪LiDAR信号的深度相机位姿回归方法，以提高大尺度定位系统的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将深度图作为RGB图像的附加通道处理，但未能充分利用深度信息的空间结构特性，而伪LiDAR信号在3D目标检测中已被证明更有效。

AI.result: 在7 Scenes数据集上，FusionLoc相较RGB-D PoseNet平均定位误差降低0.33米和4.35度，优于多种先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 伪LiDAR表示比深度图更适合相机定位任务，为大规模定位系统提供了新的技术思路。

authors_text: Guy Scher,Sadra Sadraddini,Russ Tedrake,Hadas Kress-Gazit
title: Elliptical Slice Sampling for Probabilistic Verification of Stochastic Systems with Signal Temporal Logic Specifications
title_zh: 用于具有信号时态逻辑规范的随机系统概率验证的椭圆切片采样
abstract: Autonomous robots typically incorporate complex sensors in their decision-making and control loops. These sensors, such as cameras and Lidars, have imperfections in their sensing and are influenced by environmental conditions. In this paper, we present a method for probabilistic verification of linearizable systems with Gaussian and Gaussian mixture noise models (e.g. from perception modules, machine learning components). We compute the probabilities of task satisfaction under Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications, using its robustness semantics, with a Markov Chain Monte-Carlo slice sampler. As opposed to other techniques, our method avoids over-approximations and double-counting of failure events. Central to our approach is a method for efficient and rejection-free sampling of signals from a Gaussian distribution such that satisfy or violate a given STL formula. We show illustrative examples from applications in robot motion planning.

Central to our approach is a method for efficient and rejection-free sampling of signals from a Gaussian distribution such that satisfy or violate a given STL formula. We show illustrative examples from applications in robot motion planning.

authors_text: Simon Graham,Quoc Dang Vu,Mostafa Jahanifar,Shan E Ahmed Raza,Fayyaz Minhas,David Snead,Nasir Rajpoot
title: One Model is All You Need: Multi-Task Learning Enables Simultaneous Histology Image Segmentation and Classification
title_zh: 一种模型即可满足您的需求：多任务学习可同时进行组织学图像分割和分类
abstract: The recent surge in performance for image analysis of digitised pathology slides can largely be attributed to the advances in deep learning. Deep models can be used to initially localise various structures in the tissue and hence facilitate the extraction of interpretable features for biomarker discovery. However, these models are typically trained for a single task and therefore scale poorly as we wish to adapt the model for an increasing number of different tasks. Also, supervised deep learning models are very data hungry and therefore rely on large amounts of training data to perform well. In this paper, we present a multi-task learning approach for segmentation and classification of nuclei, glands, lumina and different tissue regions that leverages data from multiple independent data sources. While ensuring that our tasks are aligned by the same tissue type and resolution, we enable meaningful simultaneous prediction with a single network. As a result of feature sharing, we also show that the learned representation can be used to improve the performance of additional tasks via transfer learning, including nuclear classification and signet ring cell detection. As part of this work, we train our developed Cerberus model on a huge amount of data, consisting of over 600K objects for segmentation and 440K patches for classification. We use our approach to process 599 colorectal whole-slide images from TCGA, where we localise 377 million, 900K and 2.1 million nuclei, glands and lumina, respectively and make the results available to the community for downstream analysis.

Also, supervised deep learning models are very data hungry and therefore rely on large amounts of training data to perform well. In this paper, we present a multi-task learning approach for segmentation and classification of nuclei, glands, lumina and different tissue regions that leverages data from multiple independent data sources. While ensuring that our tasks are aligned by the same tissue type and resolution, we enable meaningful simultaneous prediction with a single network. As a result of feature sharing, we also show that the learned representation can be used to improve the performance of additional tasks via transfer learning, including nuclear classification and signet ring cell detection. As part of this work, we train our developed Cerberus model on a huge amount of data, consisting of over 600K objects for segmentation and 440K patches for classification. abstract_zh: 最近数字化病理切片图像分析性能的激增很大程度上归功于深度学习的进步。深度模型可用于最初定位组织中的各种结构，从而有助于提取可解释的特征以发现生物标志物。然而，这些模型通常是针对单个任务进行训练的，因此当我们希望使模型适应越来越多的不同任务时，其扩展性很差。此外，有监督的深度学习模型非常需要数据，因此依赖大量的训练数据才能表现良好。在本文中，我们提出了一种多任务学习方法，用于利用来自多个独立数据源的数据对细胞核、腺体、管腔和不同组织区域进行分割和分类。在确保我们的任务按照相同的组织类型和分辨率对齐的同时，我们可以使用单个网络实现有意义的同步预测。作为特征共享的结果，我们还表明，学习到的表示可用于通过迁移学习提高其他任务的性能，包括核分类和印戒细胞检测。作为这项工作的一部分，我们在大量数据上训练我们开发的 Cerberus 模型，其中包括超过 600K 个用于分割的对象和 440K 个用于分类的补丁。我们使用我们的方法处理来自 TCGA 的 599 张结直肠全切片图像，分别定位 3.77 亿、90 万和 210 万个细胞核、腺体和管腔，并将结果提供给社区用于下游分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务学习方法，通过单个模型同时实现组织学图像的分割与分类。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型通常仅针对单一任务训练，难以适应多种任务且依赖大量标注数据。
AI.method: 开发名为Cerberus的多任务学习框架，通过共享特征表示实现分割与分类任务的联合训练，并利用迁移学习提升其他任务性能。
AI.result: 在600K分割对象和440K分类样本上训练模型，处理599张结直肠病理切片，定位3.77亿个细胞核、90万个腺体及2100万个腔体结构。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习有效提升了模型泛化能力，共享特征表示可迁移至其他任务，为病理图像分析提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Liang Qiu,Chien-Sheng Wu,Wenhao Liu,Caiming Xiong
title: Structure Extraction in Task-Oriented Dialogues with Slot Clustering
title_zh: 具有槽聚类的面向任务的对话中的结构提取
abstract: Extracting structure information from dialogue data can help us better understand user and system behaviors. In task-oriented dialogues, dialogue structure has often been considered as transition graphs among dialogue states. However, annotating dialogue states manually is expensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach for structure extraction in task-oriented dialogues. We first detect and cluster possible slot tokens with a pre-trained model to approximate dialogue ontology for a target domain. Then we track the status of each identified token group and derive a state transition structure. Empirical results show that our approach outperforms unsupervised baseline models by far in dialogue structure extraction. In addition, we show that data augmentation based on extracted structures enriches the surface formats of training data and can achieve a significant performance boost in dialogue response generation.
summary: Extracting structure information from dialogue data can help us better understand user and system behaviors. In task-oriented dialogues, dialogue structure has often been considered as transition graphs among dialogue states. However, annotating dialogue states manually is expensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach for structure extraction in task-oriented dialogues. We first detect and cluster possible slot tokens with a pre-trained model to approximate dialogue ontology for a target domain. Then we track the status of each identified token group and derive a state transition structure. Empirical results show that our approach outperforms unsupervised baseline models by far in dialogue structure extraction. In addition, we show that data augmentation based on extracted structures enriches the surface formats of training data and can achieve a significant performance boost in dialogue response generation.
abstract_zh: 从对话数据中提取结构信息可以帮助我们更好地理解用户和系统行为。在面向任务的对话中，对话结构通常被认为是对话状态之间的转换图。然而，手动注释对话状态既昂贵又耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，用于任务导向对话中的结构提取。我们首先使用预先训练的模型检测并聚类可能的槽标记，以近似目标域的对话本体。然后我们跟踪每个已识别令牌组的状态并导出状态转换结构。实证结果表明，我们的方法在对话结构提取方面远远优于无监督基线模型。此外，我们还表明，基于提取结构的数据增强丰富了训练数据的表面格式，并且可以在对话响应生成方面实现显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于槽位聚类的方法，用于任务导向对话的结构提取，以减少手动标注需求并提升响应生成效果。
AI.motivation: 手动标注对话状态成本高昂且耗时，现有方法难以有效提取对话结构，需自动化解决方案提升任务导向对话系统性能。
AI.method: 利用预训练模型检测并聚类槽位标记构建领域本体，通过跟踪标记组状态推导状态转移结构，并基于提取结构进行数据增强。
AI.result: 结构提取效果远超无监督基线模型，数据增强策略显著提升对话响应生成性能。
AI.conclusion: 槽位聚类方法有效实现对话结构自动化提取，结合数据增强可优化任务导向对话系统，为实际应用提供可行方案。

search_text: Structure Extraction in Task-Oriented Dialogues with Slot Clustering 具有槽聚类的面向任务的对话中的结构提取 Extracting structure information from dialogue data can help us better understand user and system behaviors. In task-oriented dialogues, dialogue structure has often been considered as transition graphs among dialogue states. However, annotating dialogue states manually is expensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach for structure extraction in task-oriented dialogues. We first detect and cluster possible slot tokens with a pre-trained model to approximate dialogue ontology for a target domain. Then we track the status of each identified token group and derive a state transition structure. Empirical results show that our approach outperforms unsupervised baseline models by far in dialogue structure extraction. In addition, we show that data augmentation based on extracted structures enriches the surface formats of training data and can achieve a significant performance boost in dialogue response generation. 从对话数据中提取结构信息可以帮助我们更好地理解用户和系统行为。在面向任务的对话中，对话结构通常被认为是对话状态之间的转换图。然而，手动注释对话状态既昂贵又耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，用于任务导向对话中的结构提取。我们首先使用预先训练的模型检测并聚类可能的槽标记，以近似目标域的对话本体。然后我们跟踪每个已识别令牌组的状态并导出状态转换结构。实证结果表明，我们的方法在对话结构提取方面远远优于无监督基线模型。此外，我们还表明，基于提取结构的数据增强丰富了训练数据的表面格式，并且可以在对话响应生成方面实现显着的性能提升。 提出一种基于槽位聚类的方法，用于任务导向对话的结构提取，以减少手动标注需求并提升响应生成效果。 Liang Qiu,Chien-Sheng Wu,Wenhao Liu,Caiming Xiong cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xin Tian,Nantheera Anantrasirichai,Lindsay Nicholson,Alin Achim
title: Optimal Transport-based Graph Matching for 3D retinal OCT image registration
title_zh: 用于 3D 视网膜 OCT 图像配准的基于最佳传输的图形匹配
abstract: Registration of longitudinal optical coherence tomography (OCT) images assists disease monitoring and is essential in image fusion applications. Mouse retinal OCT images are often collected for longitudinal study of eye disease models such as uveitis, but their quality is often poor compared with human imaging. This paper presents a novel but efficient framework involving an optimal transport based graph matching (OT-GM) method for 3D mouse OCT image registration. We first perform registration of fundus-like images obtained by projecting all b-scans of a volume on a plane orthogonal to them, hereafter referred to as the x-y plane. We introduce Adaptive Weighted Vessel Graph Descriptors (AWVGD) and 3D Cube Descriptors (CD) to identify the correspondence between nodes of graphs extracted from segmented vessels within the OCT projection images. The AWVGD comprises scaling, translation and rotation, which are computationally efficient, whereas CD exploits 3D spatial and frequency domain information. The OT-GM method subsequently performs the correct alignment in the x-y plane. Finally, registration along the direction orthogonal to the x-y plane (the z-direction) is guided by the segmentation of two important anatomical features peculiar to mouse b-scans, the Internal Limiting Membrane (ILM) and the hyaloid remnant (HR). Both subjective and objective evaluation results demonstrate that our framework outperforms other well-established methods on mouse OCT images within a reasonable execution time.

abstract_zh: 纵向光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 图像的配准有助于疾病监测，并且在图像融合应用中至关重要。通常收集小鼠视网膜 OCT 图像用于葡萄膜炎等眼部疾病模型的纵向研究，但与人类成像相比，其质量往往较差。本文提出了一种新颖但有效的框架，涉及用于 3D 鼠标 OCT 图像配准的基于最佳传输的图形匹配 (OT-GM) 方法。我们首先对通过将体积的所有 b 扫描投影到与它们正交的平面（以下称为 x-y 平面）上而获得的类眼底图像进行配准。我们引入自适应加权血管图描述符 (AWVGD) 和 3D 立方体描述符 (CD) 来识别从 OCT 投影图像中的分段血管中提取的图节点之间的对应关系。 AWVGD 包括缩放、平移和旋转，计算效率较高，而 CD 利用 3D 空间和频域信息。 OT-GM 方法随后在 x-y 平面中执行正确的对齐。最后，沿着与 x-y 平面正交的方向（z 方向）的配准由小鼠 B 扫描特有的两个重要解剖特征（内界膜（ILM）和玻璃体残余（HR））的分割引导。主观和客观评估结果都表明，我们的框架在合理的执行时间内优于其他小鼠 OCT 图像的成熟方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优传输的图匹配方法（OT-GM），用于3D小鼠视网膜OCT图像配准。
AI.motivation: 小鼠视网膜OCT图像质量较差，传统方法难以高效准确配准，需开发新型框架以支持疾病模型的纵向研究。
AI.method: 通过投影B扫描图像生成类视网膜图，结合自适应加权血管图描述符（AWVGD）和3D立方体描述符（CD）提取节点对应关系，利用OT-GM实现X-Y平面配准，并通过ILM和HR分割引导Z轴方向配准。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在合理时间内优于现有方法，主观和客观评估均验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: OT-GM方法为低质量小鼠OCT图像配准提供了高效解决方案，可助力疾病监测与图像融合应用。

authors_text: Niharika Thakuria,Reena Elangovan,Anand Raghunathan,Sumeet K. Gupta
title: Piezoelectric Strain FET (PeFET) based Non-Volatile Memories
title_zh: 基于压电应变 FET (PeFET) 的非易失性存储器
comment: 8 pages, 13 figures In the peer review process of the journal of IEEE Transactions on Electron Devices
comments: 8 pages, 13 figures In the peer review process of the journal of IEEE Transactions on Electron Devices
abstract: We propose non-volatile memory (NVM) designs based on Piezoelectric Strain FET (PeFET) utilizing a piezoelectric/ferroelectric (PE/FE such as PZT) coupled with 2D Transition Metal Dichalcogenide (2D-TMD such as MoS2) transistor. The proposed NVMs store bit information in the form of polarization (P) of the FE/PE, use electric-field driven P-switching for write and employ piezoelectricity induced dynamic bandgap modulation of 2D-TMD channel for bit sensing. We analyze PeFET with COMSOL based 3D modeling showing that the circuit-driven optimization of PeFET geometry is essential to achieve effective hammer-and-nail effect and adequate bandgap modulation for NVM read. Our results show that distinguishability of binary states to up to 11X is achieved in PeFETs.We propose various flavors of PeFET NVMs, namely (a) high density (HD) NVM featuring a compact access-transistor-less bit-cell, (b) 1T-1PeFET NVM with segmented architecture, targeted for optimized write energy and latency and (c) cross-coupled (CC) NVM offering a trade-off between area and latency.PeFET NVMs offer up to 7X smaller cell area, 66% lower write energy, 87% lower read energy and 44% faster read compared to 2D-FET SRAM. This comes at the cost of high write latency in PeFET NVMs, which can be minimized by virtue of optimized PE geometry.

The proposed NVMs store bit information in the form of polarization (P) of the FE/PE, use electric-field driven P-switching for write and employ piezoelectricity induced dynamic bandgap modulation of 2D-TMD channel for bit sensing. We analyze PeFET with COMSOL based 3D modeling showing that the circuit-driven optimization of PeFET geometry is essential to achieve effective hammer-and-nail effect and adequate bandgap modulation for NVM read. Our results show that distinguishability of binary states to up to 11X is achieved in PeFETs.We propose various flavors of PeFET NVMs, namely (a) high density (HD) NVM featuring a compact access-transistor-less bit-cell, (b) 1T-1PeFET NVM with segmented architecture, targeted for optimized write energy and latency and (c) cross-coupled (CC) NVM offering a trade-off between area and latency.PeFET NVMs offer up to 7X smaller cell area, 66% lower write energy, 87% lower read energy and 44% faster read compared to 2D-FET SRAM. This comes at the cost of high write latency in PeFET NVMs, which can be minimized by virtue of optimized PE geometry.
abstract_zh: 我们提出基于压电应变 FET (PeFET) 的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 设计，该设计利用压电/铁电（PE/FE，例如 PZT）与 2D 过渡金属二硫化物（2D-TMD，例如 MoS2）晶体管相结合。所提出的 NVM 以 FE/PE 的极化 (P) 形式存储位信息，使用电场驱动的 P 开关进行写入，并采用 2D-TMD 通道的压电感应动态带隙调制进行位感测。我们使用基于 COMSOL 的 3D 建模分析 PeFET，结果表明电路驱动的 PeFET 几何形状优化对于实现有效的锤子钉效应和 NVM 读取的足够带隙调制至关重要。我们的结果表明，PeFET 的二进制状态区分度高达 11X。我们提出了各种类型的 PeFET NVM，即 (a) 具有紧凑型无访问晶体管位单元的高密度 (HD) NVM，(b) 具有分段架构的 1T-1PeFET NVM，旨在优化写入能量和延迟，以及 (c) 交叉耦合 (CC) NVM，提供面积和延迟之间的权衡。PeFET NVM 提供高达与 2D-FET SRAM 相比，单元面积缩小了 7 倍，写入能量降低了 66%，读取能量降低了 87%，读取速度提高了 44%。这是以 PeFET NVM 的高写入延迟为代价的，可以通过优化的 PE 几何结构将其最小化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于压电应变场效应晶体管（PeFET）的非易失性存储器（NVM）设计，利用压电/铁电材料与二维过渡金属二硫属化合物（2D-TMD）晶体管结合，实现通过极化状态存储信息，并优化几何结构以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有非易失性存储器在面积、写入能量和读取速度方面存在局限，需探索新型器件结构以实现更高效能的存储方案。
AI.method: 采用COMSOL进行3D建模分析PeFET的几何优化，提出三种NVM架构（高密度、1T-1PeFET、交叉耦合），并对比其面积、能量和延迟性能。
AI.result: PeFET NVM相较2D-FET SRAM实现7倍面积缩减、66%写入能耗降低、87%读取能耗降低及44%读取速度提升，但需优化压电材料几何以减少写入延迟。
AI.conclusion: PeFET NVM在面积与能效上优势显著，但需进一步优化写入延迟以实现全面性能提升。

method: 采用COMSOL进行3D建模分析PeFET的几何优化，提出三种NVM架构（高密度、1T-1PeFET、交叉耦合），并对比其面积、能量和延迟性能。
result: PeFET NVM相较2D-FET SRAM实现7倍面积缩减、66%写入能耗降低、87%读取能耗降低及44%读取速度提升，但需优化压电材料几何以减少写入延迟。
conclusion: PeFET NVM在面积与能效上优势显著，但需进一步优化写入延迟以实现全面性能提升。
search_text: Piezoelectric Strain FET (PeFET) based Non-Volatile Memories 基于压电应变 FET (PeFET) 的非易失性存储器 We propose non-volatile memory (NVM) designs based on Piezoelectric Strain FET (PeFET) utilizing a piezoelectric/ferroelectric (PE/FE such as PZT) coupled with 2D Transition Metal Dichalcogenide (2D-TMD such as MoS2) transistor. The proposed NVMs store bit information in the form of polarization (P) of the FE/PE, use electric-field driven P-switching for write and employ piezoelectricity induced dynamic bandgap modulation of 2D-TMD channel for bit sensing. We analyze PeFET with COMSOL based 3D modeling showing that the circuit-driven optimization of PeFET geometry is essential to achieve effective hammer-and-nail effect and adequate bandgap modulation for NVM read. Our results show that distinguishability of binary states to up to 11X is achieved in PeFETs.We propose various flavors of PeFET NVMs, namely (a) high density (HD) NVM featuring a compact access-transistor-less bit-cell, (b) 1T-1PeFET NVM with segmented architecture, targeted for optimized write energy and latency and (c) cross-coupled (CC) NVM offering a trade-off between area and latency.PeFET NVMs offer up to 7X smaller cell area, 66% lower write energy, 87% lower read energy and 44% faster read compared to 2D-FET SRAM. This comes at the cost of high write latency in PeFET NVMs, which can be minimized by virtue of optimized PE geometry. 我们提出基于压电应变 FET (PeFET) 的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 设计，该设计利用压电/铁电（PE/FE，例如 PZT）与 2D 过渡金属二硫化物（2D-TMD，例如 MoS2）晶体管相结合。所提出的 NVM 以 FE/PE 的极化 (P) 形式存储位信息，使用电场驱动的 P 开关进行写入，并采用 2D-TMD 通道的压电感应动态带隙调制进行位感测。我们使用基于 COMSOL 的 3D 建模分析 PeFET，结果表明电路驱动的 PeFET 几何形状优化对于实现有效的锤子钉效应和 NVM 读取的足够带隙调制至关重要。我们的结果表明，PeFET 的二进制状态区分度高达 11X。我们提出了各种类型的 PeFET NVM，即 (a) 具有紧凑型无访问晶体管位单元的高密度 (HD) NVM，(b) 具有分段架构的 1T-1PeFET NVM，旨在优化写入能量和延迟，以及 (c) 交叉耦合 (CC) NVM，提供面积和延迟之间的权衡。PeFET NVM 提供高达与 2D-FET SRAM 相比，单元面积缩小了 7 倍，写入能量降低了 66%，读取能量降低了 87%，读取速度提高了 44%。这是以 PeFET NVM 的高写入延迟为代价的，可以通过优化的 PE 几何结构将其最小化。 本文提出基于压电应变场效应晶体管（PeFET）的非易失性存储器（NVM）设计，利用压电/铁电材料与二维过渡金属二硫属化合物（2D-TMD）晶体管结合，实现通过极化状态存储信息，并优化几何结构以提升性能。 Niharika Thakuria,Reena Elangovan,Anand Raghunathan,Sumeet K. Gupta cs.ET,cs.AR

authors_text: Divyansh Garg,Skanda Vaidyanath,Kuno Kim,Jiaming Song,Stefano Ermon
title: LISA: Learning Interpretable Skill Abstractions from Language
title_zh: LISA：从语言中学习可解释的技能抽象
abstract: Learning policies that effectively utilize language instructions in complex, multi-task environments is an important problem in sequential decision-making. While it is possible to condition on the entire language instruction directly, such an approach could suffer from generalization issues. In our work, we propose \emph{Learning Interpretable Skill Abstractions (LISA)}, a hierarchical imitation learning framework that can learn diverse, interpretable primitive behaviors or skills from language-conditioned demonstrations to better generalize to unseen instructions. LISA uses vector quantization to learn discrete skill codes that are highly correlated with language instructions and the behavior of the learned policy. In navigation and robotic manipulation environments, LISA outperforms a strong non-hierarchical Decision Transformer baseline in the low data regime and is able to compose learned skills to solve tasks containing unseen long-range instructions. Our method demonstrates a more natural way to condition on language in sequential decision-making problems and achieve interpretable and controllable behavior with the learned skills.
summary: Learning policies that effectively utilize language instructions in complex, multi-task environments is an important problem in sequential decision-making. While it is possible to condition on the entire language instruction directly, such an approach could suffer from generalization issues. In our work, we propose \emph{Learning Interpretable Skill Abstractions (LISA)}, a hierarchical imitation learning framework that can learn diverse, interpretable primitive behaviors or skills from language-conditioned demonstrations to better generalize to unseen instructions. LISA uses vector quantization to learn discrete skill codes that are highly correlated with language instructions and the behavior of the learned policy. In navigation and robotic manipulation environments, LISA outperforms a strong non-hierarchical Decision Transformer baseline in the low data regime and is able to compose learned skills to solve tasks containing unseen long-range instructions. Our method demonstrates a more natural way to condition on language in sequential decision-making problems and achieve interpretable and controllable behavior with the learned skills.
abstract_zh: 在复杂的多任务环境中有效利用语言指令的学习策略是顺序决策中的一个重要问题。虽然可以直接以整个语言指令为条件，但这种方法可能会遇到泛化问题。在我们的工作中，我们提出了\emph{学习可解释技能抽象（LISA）}，这是一种分层模仿学习框架，可以从语言条件演示中学习多种、可解释的原始行为或技能，以更好地泛化到看不见的指令。 LISA 使用矢量量化来学习与语言指令和学习策略的行为高度相关的离散技能代码。在导航和机器人操作环境中，LISA 在低数据状态下的性能优于强大的非分层决策转换器基线，并且能够组合学习的技能来解决包含看不见的远程指令的任务。我们的方法展示了一种更自然的方法，可以在顺序决策问题中以语言为条件，并利用所学技能实现可解释和可控的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LISA框架，从语言指令中学习可解释的技能抽象，以提升复杂环境下的决策能力。
AI.motivation: 直接使用完整语言指令可能导致泛化问题，需更有效的方法学习可解释技能以提升泛化能力。
AI.method: LISA采用分层模仿学习，通过向量量化生成与语言指令和行为相关的离散技能代码，实现技能组合。
AI.result: LISA在低数据场景下优于非分层方法，能组合技能解决未见长指令任务。
AI.conclusion: LISA展示了更自然的语言条件方法，实现可解释且可控的决策行为。

authors_text: Samir Aroudj,Steven Lovegrove,Eddy Ilg,Tanner Schmidt,Michael Goesele,Richard Newcombe
title: ERF: Explicit Radiance Field Reconstruction From Scratch
title_zh: ERF：从头开始显式辐射场重建
abstract: We propose a novel explicit dense 3D reconstruction approach that processes a set of images of a scene with sensor poses and calibrations and estimates a photo-real digital model. One of the key innovations is that the underlying volumetric representation is completely explicit in contrast to neural network-based (implicit) alternatives. We encode scenes explicitly using clear and understandable mappings of optimization variables to scene geometry and their outgoing surface radiance. We represent them using hierarchical volumetric fields stored in a sparse voxel octree. Robustly reconstructing such a volumetric scene model with millions of unknown variables from registered scene images only is a highly non-convex and complex optimization problem. To this end, we employ stochastic gradient descent (Adam) which is steered by an inverse differentiable renderer. We demonstrate that our method can reconstruct models of high quality that are comparable to state-of-the-art implicit methods. Importantly, we do not use a sequential reconstruction pipeline where individual steps suffer from incomplete or unreliable information from previous stages, but start our optimizations from uniformed initial solutions with scene geometry and radiance that is far off from the ground truth. We show that our method is general and practical. It does not require a highly controlled lab setup for capturing, but allows for reconstructing scenes with a vast variety of objects, including challenging ones, such as outdoor plants or furry toys. Finally, our reconstructed scene models are versatile thanks to their explicit design. They can be edited interactively which is computationally too costly for implicit alternatives.

We represent them using hierarchical volumetric fields stored in a sparse voxel octree. Robustly reconstructing such a volumetric scene model with millions of unknown variables from registered scene images only is a highly non-convex and complex optimization problem. To this end, we employ stochastic gradient descent (Adam) which is steered by an inverse differentiable renderer. We demonstrate that our method can reconstruct models of high quality that are comparable to state-of-the-art implicit methods. Importantly, we do not use a sequential reconstruction pipeline where individual steps suffer from incomplete or unreliable information from previous stages, but start our optimizations from uniformed initial solutions with scene geometry and radiance that is far off from the ground truth. abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的显式密集 3D 重建方法，该方法可以处理一组具有传感器姿势和校准的场景图像，并估计照片真实的数字模型。关键创新之一是，与基于神经网络（隐式）的替代方案相比，底层的体积表示是完全显式的。我们使用清晰且易于理解的优化变量到场景几何形状及其出射表面辐射度的映射来显式地对场景进行编码。我们使用存储在稀疏体素八叉树中的分层体积场来表示它们。仅从注册的场景图像中稳健地重建具有数百万个未知变量的体积场景模型是一个高度非凸且复杂的优化问题。为此，我们采用随机梯度下降（Adam），它由逆可微渲染器控制。我们证明我们的方法可以重建与最先进的隐式方法相当的高质量模型。重要的是，我们不使用顺序重建管道，其中各个步骤受到前一阶段的不完整或不可靠信息的影响，而是从场景几何和辐射度远离真实情况的统一初始解决方案开始优化。我们表明我们的方法是通用且实用的。它不需要高度控制的实验室设置来进行捕捉，但允许重建具有各种物体的场景，包括具有挑战性的物体，例如户外植物或毛茸茸的玩具。最后，我们重建的场景模型由于其明确的设计而具有多种用途。它们可以交互地编辑，这对于隐式替代方案来说计算成本太高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从图像序列中重建显式辐射场模型的新方法，实现高质量的3D场景重建。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式神经网络方法难以直接编辑重建结果，且依赖复杂流水线；显式方法虽直观但优化困难，需解决大规模变量下的非凸优化问题。
AI.method: 采用显式体素八叉树表示场景，结合可微渲染器与随机梯度下降（Adam）优化，从统一初始解直接优化几何与光照参数，无需分步流水线。
AI.result: 重建质量可与隐式方法媲美，支持户外植物、毛绒玩具等复杂物体，且生成的显式模型支持交互式编辑。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在通用性、实用性及可编辑性上优于传统方法，为复杂场景重建提供新思路。

authors_text: Jørgen A. Agersborg,Luigi T. Luppino,Stian Normann Anfinsen,Jane Uhd Jepsen
title: Towards Targeted Change Detection with Heterogeneous Remote Sensing Images for Forest Mortality Mapping
title_zh: 利用异构遥感图像进行有针对性的变化检测以绘制森林死亡率图
abstract: Several generic methods have recently been developed for change detection in heterogeneous remote sensing data, such as images from synthetic aperture radar (SAR) and multispectral radiometers. However, these are not well suited to detect weak signatures of certain disturbances of ecological systems. To resolve this problem we propose a new approach based on image-to-image translation and one-class classification (OCC). We aim to map forest mortality caused by an outbreak of geometrid moths in a sparsely forested forest-tundra ecotone using multisource satellite images. The images preceding and following the event are collected by Landsat-5 and RADARSAT-2, respectively. Using a recent deep learning method for change-aware image translation, we compute difference images in both satellites' respective domains. These differences are stacked with the original pre- and post-event images and passed to an OCC trained on a small sample from the targeted change class. The classifier produces a credible map of the complex pattern of forest mortality.

These differences are stacked with the original pre- and post-event images and passed to an OCC trained on a small sample from the targeted change class. The classifier produces a credible map of the complex pattern of forest mortality.
abstract_zh: 最近开发了几种通用方法用于异构遥感数据的变化检测，例如来自合成孔径雷达（SAR）和多光谱辐射计的图像。然而，这些不太适合检测生态系统某些干扰的微弱特征。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于图像到图像转换和一类分类（OCC）的新方法。我们的目标是利用多源卫星图像绘制稀疏森林-苔原生态交错带中尺蛾爆发造成的森林死亡率。事件前后的图像分别由 Landsat-5 和 RADARSAT-2 收集。使用最新的深度学习方法进行变化感知图像翻译，我们计算了两颗卫星各自域中的差异图像。这些差异与原始的事件前和事件后图像堆叠在一起，并传递给 OCC，该 OCC 在目标变更类的小样本上进行训练。分类器生成了森林死亡率复杂模式的可靠地图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异构遥感图像的定向变化检测方法，用于绘制森林死亡图。
AI.motivation: 现有通用变化检测方法难以捕捉生态系统的微弱扰动信号，需针对性解决森林死亡监测问题。
AI.method: 结合图像到图像翻译与一类分类（OCC），利用多源卫星数据生成差异图像并训练分类器。
AI.result: 成功生成几何蛾爆发导致的森林死亡可信分布图，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在复杂模式识别和小样本场景下表现优异，为生态变化监测提供新思路。
