authors_text: Jiali Duan,Liqun Chen,Son Tran,Jinyu Yang,Yi Xu,Belinda Zeng,Trishul Chilimbi
title: Multi-modal Alignment using Representation Codebook
title_zh: 使用表示码本的多模态对齐
abstract: Aligning signals from different modalities is an important step in vision-language representation learning as it affects the performance of later stages such as cross-modality fusion. Since image and text typically reside in different regions of the feature space, directly aligning them at instance level is challenging especially when features are still evolving during training. In this paper, we propose to align at a higher and more stable level using cluster representation. Specifically, we treat image and text as two "views" of the same entity, and encode them into a joint vision-language coding space spanned by a dictionary of cluster centers (codebook). We contrast positive and negative samples via their cluster assignments while simultaneously optimizing the cluster centers. To further smooth out the learning process, we adopt a teacher-student distillation paradigm, where the momentum teacher of one view guides the student learning of the other. We evaluated our approach on common vision language benchmarks and obtain new SoTA on zero-shot cross modality retrieval while being competitive on various other transfer tasks.

To further smooth out the learning process, we adopt a teacher-student distillation paradigm, where the momentum teacher of one view guides the student learning of the other. abstract_zh: 对齐来自不同模态的信号是视觉语言表示学习的重要一步，因为它会影响后期阶段（例如跨模态融合）的性能。由于图像和文本通常位于特征空间的不同区域，因此在实例级别直接对齐它们具有挑战性，尤其是当特征在训练期间仍在演变时。在本文中，我们建议使用聚类表示在更高、更稳定的水平上进行对齐。具体来说，我们将图像和文本视为同一实体的两个“视图”，并将它们编码到由聚类中心字典（码本）跨越的联合视觉语言编码空间中。我们通过聚类分配来对比正样本和负样本，同时优化聚类中心。为了进一步平滑学习过程，我们采用师生蒸馏范式，其中一种观点的动量教师指导另一种观点的学生学习。我们在通用视觉语言基准上评估了我们的方法，并在零样本交叉模态检索上获得了新的 SoTA，同时在各种其他传输任务上具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于表示代码本的多模态对齐方法，解决视觉-语言特征空间中的跨模态对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 由于图像和文本特征分布在不同区域，直接实例级对齐困难，需在更高层次进行稳定对齐以提升跨模态融合效果。
AI.method: 通过构建聚类中心代码本，将图像和文本编码到联合空间，利用聚类分配对比正负样本并优化中心，结合教师-学生蒸馏机制稳定学习过程。
AI.result: 在常见视觉语言基准测试中，零样本跨模态检索达到新SOTA，其他迁移任务表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 基于代码本的跨模态对齐方法结合蒸馏机制有效提升了视觉-语言任务的性能，尤其在零样本检索中表现突出。

authors_text: Hao Tang,Ling Shao,Philip H. S. Torr,Nicu Sebe
title: Local and Global GANs with Semantic-Aware Upsampling for Image Generation
title_zh: 具有语义感知上采样的本地和全局 GAN 用于图像生成
comment: Accepted to TPAMI, an extended version of a paper published in CVPR 2020. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1912.12215
comments: Accepted to TPAMI, an extended version of a paper published in CVPR 2020. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1912.12215
abstract: In this paper, we address the task of semantic-guided image generation. One challenge common to most existing image-level generation methods is the difficulty in generating small objects and detailed local textures. To address this, in this work we consider generating images using local context. As such, we design a local class-specific generative network using semantic maps as guidance, which separately constructs and learns subgenerators for different classes, enabling it to capture finer details. To learn more discriminative class-specific feature representations for the local generation, we also propose a novel classification module. To combine the advantages of both global image-level and local class-specific generation, a joint generation network is designed with an attention fusion module and a dual-discriminator structure embedded. Lastly, we propose a novel semantic-aware upsampling method, which has a larger receptive field and can take far-away pixels that are semantically related for feature upsampling, enabling it to better preserve semantic consistency for instances with the same semantic labels. Extensive experiments on two image generation tasks show the superior performance of the proposed method. State-of-the-art results are established by large margins on both tasks and on nine challenging public benchmarks. The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/Ha0Tang/LGGAN.
summary: In this paper, we address the task of semantic-guided image generation. One challenge common to most existing image-level generation methods is the difficulty in generating small objects and detailed local textures. To combine the advantages of both global image-level and local class-specific generation, a joint generation network is designed with an attention fusion module and a dual-discriminator structure embedded. Lastly, we propose a novel semantic-aware upsampling method, which has a larger receptive field and can take far-away pixels that are semantically related for feature upsampling, enabling it to better preserve semantic consistency for instances with the same semantic labels. Extensive experiments on two image generation tasks show the superior performance of the proposed method. The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/Ha0Tang/LGGAN.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了语义引导图像生成的任务。大多数现有图像级生成方法面临的一个共同挑战是难以生成小对象和详细的局部纹理。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们考虑使用本地上下文生成图像。因此，我们使用语义图作为指导设计了一个局部特定类生成网络，它分别构建和学习不同类的子生成器，使其能够捕获更精细的细节。为了学习本地生成更具辨别力的特定类别特征表示，我们还提出了一种新颖的分类模块。为了结合全局图像级和局部特定类生成的优点，设计了一个联合生成网络，其中嵌入了注意融合模块和双鉴别器结构。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的语义感知上采样方法，该方法具有更大的感受野，并且可以采用语义相关的远距离像素进行特征上采样，使其能够更好地保持具有相同语义标签的实例的语义一致性。对两个图像生成任务的大量实验表明了该方法的优越性能。最先进的结果是在这两项任务和九个具有挑战性的公共基准上都取得了很大的优势。源代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/Ha0Tang/LGGAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合局部与全局生成机制的GAN模型，通过语义感知上采样技术解决语义引导图像生成中的小物体和细节纹理生成难题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成方法难以生成小物体和局部细节纹理，传统全局生成方式无法有效捕捉语义地图中的局部特征。
AI.method: 设计局部类特定生成网络与全局生成网络的联合架构，包含注意力融合模块和双判别器结构，并提出具有更大感受野的语义感知上采样方法。
AI.result: 在两个图像生成任务和九个公开基准测试中均取得显著优于现有方法的性能，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部-全局联合生成与语义感知上采样机制，有效提升了语义引导图像生成的质量，特别是在小物体和纹理细节的保留上表现突出。

search_text: Local and Global GANs with Semantic-Aware Upsampling for Image Generation 具有语义感知上采样的本地和全局 GAN 用于图像生成 In this paper, we address the task of semantic-guided image generation. One challenge common to most existing image-level generation methods is the difficulty in generating small objects and detailed local textures. To address this, in this work we consider generating images using local context. As such, we design a local class-specific generative network using semantic maps as guidance, which separately constructs and learns subgenerators for different classes, enabling it to capture finer details. To learn more discriminative class-specific feature representations for the local generation, we also propose a novel classification module. To combine the advantages of both global image-level and local class-specific generation, a joint generation network is designed with an attention fusion module and a dual-discriminator structure embedded. Lastly, we propose a novel semantic-aware upsampling method, which has a larger receptive field and can take far-away pixels that are semantically related for feature upsampling, enabling it to better preserve semantic consistency for instances with the same semantic labels. Extensive experiments on two image generation tasks show the superior performance of the proposed method. State-of-the-art results are established by large margins on both tasks and on nine challenging public benchmarks. The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/Ha0Tang/LGGAN. 在本文中，我们解决了语义引导图像生成的任务。大多数现有图像级生成方法面临的一个共同挑战是难以生成小对象和详细的局部纹理。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们考虑使用本地上下文生成图像。因此，我们使用语义图作为指导设计了一个局部特定类生成网络，它分别构建和学习不同类的子生成器，使其能够捕获更精细的细节。为了学习本地生成更具辨别力的特定类别特征表示，我们还提出了一种新颖的分类模块。为了结合全局图像级和局部特定类生成的优点，设计了一个联合生成网络，其中嵌入了注意融合模块和双鉴别器结构。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的语义感知上采样方法，该方法具有更大的感受野，并且可以采用语义相关的远距离像素进行特征上采样，使其能够更好地保持具有相同语义标签的实例的语义一致性。对两个图像生成任务的大量实验表明了该方法的优越性能。最先进的结果是在这两项任务和九个具有挑战性的公共基准上都取得了很大的优势。源代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/Ha0Tang/LGGAN 获取。 本文提出一种结合局部与全局生成机制的GAN模型，通过语义感知上采样技术解决语义引导图像生成中的小物体和细节纹理生成难题。 Hao Tang,Ling Shao,Philip H. authors_text: Mattias P. Heinrich,Lasse Hansen
title: Voxelmorph++ Going beyond the cranial vault with keypoint supervision and multi-channel instance optimisation
title_zh: Voxelmorph++ 通过关键点监控和多通道实例优化超越颅顶
abstract: The majority of current research in deep learning based image registration addresses inter-patient brain registration with moderate deformation magnitudes. The recent Learn2Reg medical registration benchmark has demonstrated that single-scale U-Net architectures, such as VoxelMorph that directly employ a spatial transformer loss, often do not generalise well beyond the cranial vault and fall short of state-of-the-art performance for abdominal or intra-patient lung registration. Here, we propose two straightforward steps that greatly reduce this gap in accuracy. First, we employ keypoint self-supervision with a novel network head that predicts a discretised heatmap and robustly reduces large deformations for better robustness. Second, we replace multiple learned fine-tuning steps by a single instance optimisation with hand-crafted features and the Adam optimiser. Different to other related work, including FlowNet or PDD-Net, our approach does not require a fully discretised architecture with correlation layer. Our ablation study demonstrates the importance of keypoints in both self-supervised and unsupervised (using only a MIND metric) settings. On a multi-centric inspiration-exhale lung CT dataset, including very challenging COPD scans, our method outperforms VoxelMorph by improving nonlinear alignment by 77% compared to 19% - reaching target registration errors of 2 mm that outperform all but one learning methods published to date. Extending the method to semantic features sets new stat-of-the-art performance on inter-subject abdominal CT registration.

abstract_zh: 当前基于深度学习的图像配准的大多数研究都涉及具有中等变形幅度的患者间大脑配准。最近的 Learn2Reg 医疗注册基准测试表明，单尺度 U-Net 架构（例如直接采用空间变压器损耗的 VoxelMorph）通常无法很好地推广到颅顶之外，并且达不到腹部或患者体内肺部注册的最先进性能。在这里，我们提出了两个简单的步骤，可以大大缩小准确性方面的差距。首先，我们采用关键点自监督和新颖的网络头来预测离散热图并稳健地减少大变形以获得更好的鲁棒性。其次，我们用手工制作的特征和 Adam 优化器的单个实例优化来取代多个学习的微调步骤。与其他相关工作（包括 FlowNet 或 PDD-Net）不同，我们的方法不需要具有相关层的完全离散架构。我们的消融研究证明了关键点在自我监督和无监督（仅使用 MIND 指标）设置中的重要性。在多中心吸气-呼气肺部 CT 数据集上，包括非常具有挑战性的 COPD 扫描，我们的方法优于 VoxelMorph，非线性对齐提高了 77%，而目标配准误差为 19%，达到 2 毫米的目标配准误差，优于迄今为止发布的除一种学习方法之外的所有方法。该方法扩展到语义特征，在受试者间腹部 CT 配准方面设置了新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的Voxelmorph++方法，通过关键点监督和多通道实例优化提升医学图像配准的准确性，特别是在颅外区域如腹部和肺部。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的图像配准方法在颅外区域（如腹部和肺部）表现不佳，难以处理大形变和复杂解剖结构，需提升配准精度以满足临床需求。
AI.method: 提出两步改进：1）引入关键点自监督机制，通过预测离散热图增强大形变鲁棒性；2）用手工特征和Adam优化器的单次实例优化替代多阶段微调，避免全离散化架构。
AI.result: 在多中心肺部CT数据集（含COPD病例）中，非线性对齐提升77%（目标配准误差达2mm），优于现有方法；语义特征扩展使腹部CT配准达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 关键点监督与实例优化结合显著提升颅外医学图像配准性能，为复杂解剖结构的精准配准提供有效方案。

authors_text: Kun Wang,Mridul Aanjaneya,Kostas Bekris
title: A Recurrent Differentiable Engine for Modeling Tensegrity Robots Trainable with Low-Frequency Data
title_zh: 用于建模可使用低频数据训练的张拉整体机器人的循环可微引擎
abstract: Tensegrity robots, composed of rigid rods and flexible cables, are difficult to accurately model and control given the presence of complex dynamics and high number of DoFs. Differentiable physics engines have been recently proposed as a data-driven approach for model identification of such complex robotic systems. These engines are often executed at a high-frequency to achieve accurate simulation. Ground truth trajectories for training differentiable engines, however, are not typically available at such high frequencies due to limitations of real-world sensors. The present work focuses on this frequency mismatch, which impacts the modeling accuracy. We proposed a recurrent structure for a differentiable physics engine of tensegrity robots, which can be trained effectively even with low-frequency trajectories. To train this new recurrent engine in a robust way, this work introduces relative to prior work: (i) a new implicit integration scheme, (ii) a progressive training pipeline, and (iii) a differentiable collision checker. A model of NASA's icosahedron SUPERballBot on MuJoCo is used as the ground truth system to collect training data. Simulated experiments show that once the recurrent differentiable engine has been trained given the low-frequency trajectories from MuJoCo, it is able to match the behavior of MuJoCo's system. The criterion for success is whether a locomotion strategy learned using the differentiable engine can be transferred back to the ground-truth system and result in a similar motion. Notably, the amount of ground truth data needed to train the differentiable engine, such that the policy is transferable to the ground truth system, is 1% of the data needed to train the policy directly on the ground-truth system.

abstract_zh: 张拉整体机器人由刚性杆和柔性电缆组成，由于存在复杂的动力学和大量自由度，因此很难精确建模和控制。最近提出了可微物理引擎作为一种数据驱动的方法，用于此类复杂机器人系统的模型识别。这些引擎通常以高频率执行以实现精确的模拟。然而，由于现实世界传感器的限制，用于训练可微分引擎的地面实况轨迹通常无法在如此高的频率下使用。目前的工作重点是这种频率不匹配，它会影响建模的准确性。我们为张拉整体机器人的可微分物理引擎提出了一种循环结构，即使使用低频轨迹也可以有效地进行训练。为了以稳健的方式训练这种新的循环引擎，这项工作相对于之前的工作引入了：（i）新的隐式集成方案，（ii）渐进式训练管道，以及（iii）可微分碰撞检查器。 MuJoCo 上的 NASA 二十面体 SUPERballBot 模型被用作收集训练数据的地面实况系统。模拟实验表明，一旦给定 MuJoCo 的低频轨迹训练了循环可微引擎，它就能够匹配 MuJoCo 系统的行为。成功的标准是使用可微分引擎学习的运动策略是否可以转移回地面实况系统并产生类似的运动。值得注意的是，训练可微引擎（使得策略可转移到地面实况系统）所需的地面实况数据量是直接在地面实况系统上训练策略所需数据的 1%。

AI.motivation: 张力整体机器人因复杂动力学和高自由度难以精确建模，传统可微物理引擎需高频数据但现实传感器受限，导致建模精度下降。
AI.method: 设计循环结构的可微引擎，结合隐式积分方案、渐进式训练流程及可微碰撞检测器，利用NASA SUPERballBot模型在MuJoCo中生成训练数据。
AI.result: 训练后的引擎仅需1%的地面真实数据即可匹配MuJoCo系统行为，且学习到的运动策略可成功迁移至真实系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了高频仿真与低频数据间的差距，显著降低了训练数据需求，为复杂机器人建模提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: A Recurrent Differentiable Engine for Modeling Tensegrity Robots Trainable with Low-Frequency Data 用于建模可使用低频数据训练的张拉整体机器人的循环可微引擎 Tensegrity robots, composed of rigid rods and flexible cables, are difficult to accurately model and control given the presence of complex dynamics and high number of DoFs. Differentiable physics engines have been recently proposed as a data-driven approach for model identification of such complex robotic systems. These engines are often executed at a high-frequency to achieve accurate simulation. Ground truth trajectories for training differentiable engines, however, are not typically available at such high frequencies due to limitations of real-world sensors. The present work focuses on this frequency mismatch, which impacts the modeling accuracy. We proposed a recurrent structure for a differentiable physics engine of tensegrity robots, which can be trained effectively even with low-frequency trajectories. To train this new recurrent engine in a robust way, this work introduces relative to prior work: (i) a new implicit integration scheme, (ii) a progressive training pipeline, and (iii) a differentiable collision checker. A model of NASA's icosahedron SUPERballBot on MuJoCo is used as the ground truth system to collect training data. Simulated experiments show that once the recurrent differentiable engine has been trained given the low-frequency trajectories from MuJoCo, it is able to match the behavior of MuJoCo's system. The criterion for success is whether a locomotion strategy learned using the differentiable engine can be transferred back to the ground-truth system and result in a similar motion. Notably, the amount of ground truth data needed to train the differentiable engine, such that the policy is transferable to the ground truth system, is 1% of the data needed to train the policy directly on the ground-truth system. 张拉整体机器人由刚性杆和柔性电缆组成，由于存在复杂的动力学和大量自由度，因此很难精确建模和控制。最近提出了可微物理引擎作为一种数据驱动的方法，用于此类复杂机器人系统的模型识别。这些引擎通常以高频率执行以实现精确的模拟。然而，由于现实世界传感器的限制，用于训练可微分引擎的地面实况轨迹通常无法在如此高的频率下使用。目前的工作重点是这种频率不匹配，它会影响建模的准确性。我们为张拉整体机器人的可微分物理引擎提出了一种循环结构，即使使用低频轨迹也可以有效地进行训练。为了以稳健的方式训练这种新的循环引擎，这项工作相对于之前的工作引入了：（i）新的隐式集成方案，（ii）渐进式训练管道，以及（iii）可微分碰撞检查器。 MuJoCo 上的 NASA 二十面体 SUPERballBot 模型被用作收集训练数据的地面实况系统。模拟实验表明，一旦给定 MuJoCo 的低频轨迹训练了循环可微引擎，它就能够匹配 MuJoCo 系统的行为。成功的标准是使用可微分引擎学习的运动策略是否可以转移回地面实况系统并产生类似的运动。值得注意的是，训练可微引擎（使得策略可转移到地面实况系统）所需的地面实况数据量是直接在地面实况系统上训练策略所需数据的 1%。 本文提出了一种基于循环结构的可微物理引擎，用于在低频数据下建模张力整体机器人，解决高频仿真与低频真实数据之间的频率不匹配问题。 Kun Wang,Mridul Aanjaneya,Kostas Bekris cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Charles N. Christensen,Meng Lu,Edward N. Ward,Pietro Lio,Clemens F. Kaminski
title: Spatio-temporal Vision Transformer for Super-resolution Microscopy
title_zh: 用于超分辨率显微镜的时空视觉变换器
abstract: Structured illumination microscopy (SIM) is an optical super-resolution technique that enables live-cell imaging beyond the diffraction limit. Reconstruction of SIM data is prone to artefacts, which becomes problematic when imaging highly dynamic samples because previous methods rely on the assumption that samples are static. We propose a new transformer-based reconstruction method, VSR-SIM, that uses shifted 3-dimensional window multi-head attention in addition to channel attention mechanism to tackle the problem of video super-resolution (VSR) in SIM. The attention mechanisms are found to capture motion in sequences without the need for common motion estimation techniques such as optical flow. We take an approach to training the network that relies solely on simulated data using videos of natural scenery with a model for SIM image formation. We demonstrate a use case enabled by VSR-SIM referred to as rolling SIM imaging, which increases temporal resolution in SIM by a factor of 9. Our method can be applied to any SIM setup enabling precise recordings of dynamic processes in biomedical research with high temporal resolution.

The attention mechanisms are found to capture motion in sequences without the need for common motion estimation techniques such as optical flow. We take an approach to training the network that relies solely on simulated data using videos of natural scenery with a model for SIM image formation. abstract_zh: 结构照明显微镜 (SIM) 是一种光学超分辨率技术，可以实现超越衍射极限的活细胞成像。 SIM 数据的重建很容易出现伪影，这在对高动态样本进行成像时会出现问题，因为以前的方法依赖于样本是静态的假设。我们提出了一种新的基于 Transformer 的重建方法 VSR-SIM，该方法除了通道注意机制之外还使用移位 3 维窗口多头注意来解决 SIM 中的视频超分辨率（VSR）问题。发现注意力机制可以捕获序列中的运动，而不需要常见的运动估计技术（例如光流）。我们采用一种仅依赖于使用自然风景视频和 SIM 图像形成模型的模拟数据来训练网络的方法。我们演示了由 VSR-SIM 实现的用例，称为滚动 SIM 成像，它将 SIM 的时间分辨率提高了 9 倍。我们的方法可以应用于任何 SIM 设置，从而能够以高时间分辨率精确记录生物医学研究中的动态过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空视觉变换器的新型重建方法VSR-SIM，用于解决结构光照明显微镜（SIM）在动态样本超分辨率成像中的伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 传统SIM重建方法假设样本静态，难以处理动态样本导致的运动伪影，亟需新的算法提升动态过程成像精度。
AI.method: 设计包含三维位移窗口多头注意力和通道注意力机制的Transformer架构，通过模拟自然视频数据训练网络，无需依赖光流等传统运动估计技术。
AI.result: 实现滚动SIM成像模式，将SIM时间分辨率提升9倍，在动态生物样本中显著减少伪影并保持高时空分辨率。
AI.conclusion: VSR-SIM方法为动态生物过程的高精度超分辨率成像提供了通用解决方案，可推广至各类SIM系统提升生物医学研究水平。

authors_text: Samuel Thomas,Hong-Kwang J. Kuo,Brian Kingsbury,George Saon
title: Towards Reducing the Need for Speech Training Data To Build Spoken Language Understanding Systems
title_zh: 减少构建口语理解系统对语音训练数据的需求

abstract: The lack of speech data annotated with labels required for spoken language understanding (SLU) is often a major hurdle in building end-to-end (E2E) systems that can directly process speech inputs. In contrast, large amounts of text data with suitable labels are usually available. In this paper, we propose a novel text representation and training methodology that allows E2E SLU systems to be effectively constructed using these text resources. With very limited amounts of additional speech, we show that these models can be further improved to perform at levels close to similar systems built on the full speech datasets. The efficacy of our proposed approach is demonstrated on both intent and entity tasks using three different SLU datasets. With text-only training, the proposed system achieves up to 90% of the performance possible with full speech training. With just an additional 10% of speech data, these models significantly improve further to 97% of full performance.
summary: The lack of speech data annotated with labels required for spoken language understanding (SLU) is often a major hurdle in building end-to-end (E2E) systems that can directly process speech inputs. In contrast, large amounts of text data with suitable labels are usually available. In this paper, we propose a novel text representation and training methodology that allows E2E SLU systems to be effectively constructed using these text resources. With very limited amounts of additional speech, we show that these models can be further improved to perform at levels close to similar systems built on the full speech datasets. The efficacy of our proposed approach is demonstrated on both intent and entity tasks using three different SLU datasets. With text-only training, the proposed system achieves up to 90% of the performance possible with full speech training. With just an additional 10% of speech data, these models significantly improve further to 97% of full performance.
abstract_zh: 缺乏口语理解 (SLU) 所需的带有标签的语音数据通常是构建可直接处理语音输入的端到端 (E2E) 系统的主要障碍。相反，通常可以获得大量带有合适标签的文本数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的文本表示和训练方法，允许使用这些文本资源有效地构建 E2E SLU 系统。通过非常有限的额外语音，我们表明这些模型可以进一步改进，以接近基于完整语音数据集构建的类似系统的水平。使用三个不同的 SLU 数据集在意图和实体任务上证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。通过纯文本训练，所提出的系统可实现高达完整语音训练性能的 90%。只需额外 10% 的语音数据，这些模型就可以显着进一步提升至 97% 的全部性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过利用大量可用的文本数据，减少构建端到端语音理解系统对语音训练数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 语音数据标注成本高且获取困难，而文本数据通常具有丰富的标签资源，需探索利用文本数据构建SLU系统的新方法。
AI.method: 提出基于文本的新型表示方法与训练策略，通过文本数据预训练模型，并结合少量语音数据进行微调。

search_text: Towards Reducing the Need for Speech Training Data To Build Spoken Language Understanding Systems 减少构建口语理解系统对语音训练数据的需求 The lack of speech data annotated with labels required for spoken language understanding (SLU) is often a major hurdle in building end-to-end (E2E) systems that can directly process speech inputs. In contrast, large amounts of text data with suitable labels are usually available. In this paper, we propose a novel text representation and training methodology that allows E2E SLU systems to be effectively constructed using these text resources. With very limited amounts of additional speech, we show that these models can be further improved to perform at levels close to similar systems built on the full speech datasets. The efficacy of our proposed approach is demonstrated on both intent and entity tasks using three different SLU datasets. With text-only training, the proposed system achieves up to 90% of the performance possible with full speech training. With just an additional 10% of speech data, these models significantly improve further to 97% of full performance. 缺乏口语理解 (SLU) 所需的带有标签的语音数据通常是构建可直接处理语音输入的端到端 (E2E) 系统的主要障碍。相反，通常可以获得大量带有合适标签的文本数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的文本表示和训练方法，允许使用这些文本资源有效地构建 E2E SLU 系统。通过非常有限的额外语音，我们表明这些模型可以进一步改进，以接近基于完整语音数据集构建的类似系统的水平。使用三个不同的 SLU 数据集在意图和实体任务上证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。通过纯文本训练，所提出的系统可实现高达完整语音训练性能的 90%。只需额外 10% 的语音数据，这些模型就可以显着进一步提升至 97% 的全部性能。 本文旨在通过利用大量可用的文本数据，减少构建端到端语音理解系统对语音训练数据的依赖。 Samuel Thomas,Hong-Kwang J. Kuo,Brian Kingsbury,George Saon cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS
